Set.Name: OnNew SQL
OnModify SQL
Set.Sql: UPDATE ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB SET ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID, SER_CONN_ID = @SER_CONN_ID, SER_ID = @SER_ID, SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID, ENQ_JNY_PRICE = @ENQ_JNY_PRICE, ENQ_JNY_PRICE_OP = @ENQ_JNY_PRICE_OP, ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP = @ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, SUP_DOWN_ID = @SUP_DOWN_ID, COIN_ID = @COIN_ID, SUB_UNID = @SUB_UNID, SUB_NUM = @SUB_NUM, SUB_TAG = @SUB_TAG, ENQ_OTHER_SER_ID = @ENQ_OTHER_SER_ID, CP_TYPE = @CP_TYPE, ENQ_JNY_EXT0 = @ENQ_JNY_EXT0, ENQ_JNY_SER_REMARK = @ENQ_JNY_SER_REMARK, SER_KEY0 = @SER_KEY0, SER_KEY1 = @SER_KEY1, SER_CITY_ID = @SER_CITY_ID WHERE ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = @ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: CheckError SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT '已存在此供应商询价，请做变更单' as EWA_ERR_OUT FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN WHERE SUP_ID=@SUP_DOWN_ID AND SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' AND ENQ_ID IN (SELECT ENQ_ID FROM ENQ_MAIN WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID)

Set.Name: GETKEY0
Set.Sql:
SELECT SER_CONN_ID,SER_KEY_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_JNY_ID=@ENQ_JNY_ID
) B ON A.SUP_ID=@SUP_DOWN_ID AND OWN_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND SER_CONN_STATE='USED' AND A.SER_ID=998 AND ( A.CITY_ID=B.TO_ADD OR ISNULL(A.CITY_ID,0)=ISNULL(B.TO_ADD2,0) ) INNER JOIN SER_KEY C ON A.SER_KEY0=C.SER_KEY_ID

Set.Name: GETCITY
Set.Sql: SELECT A.CITY_ID,B.CITY_NAME FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN CITY B ON A.CITY_ID=B.CITY_ID WHERE SER_CONN_ID=@SER_CONN_ID

Set.Name: GETCOIN
Set.Sql: SELECT A.COIN_ID,B.COIN_KEY FROM SER_CONN A INNER JOIN SYS_COIN B ON A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID WHERE SER_CONN_ID=@SER_CONN_ID

Set.Name: GETLR
Set.Sql: SELECT CAST( Convert(decimal(18,2),DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,1,@TO_COIN_ID,BUDGET_PROFIT) ) AS VARCHAR(20)) +'/'+COIN_KEY BUDGET_PROFIT FROM V_GRP_FIN_ALL1 A INNER JOIN SYS_COIN B ON B.COIN_ID=@TO_COIN_ID WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID
SELECT SUP_NAME,B.SUP_ID FROM HK_ACC_MAIN A INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN B ON A.SOURCE_ID=B.SUP_ID
SELECT '第'+CAST(ENQ_JNY_DAY AS VARCHAR(10))+'日['+isnull(WAY_CODE,'?')+']' AS EDAY,ENQ_JNY_ID FROM ENQ_JNY WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DAY
SELECT SER_NAME,SER_ID FROM SER_MAIN WHERE SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND SER_ID=998
SELECT COIN_KEY,COIN_ID FROM SYS_COIN

Set.Name: ENQ_MAIN
Set.Sql: SELECT convert(varchar(12) , F_DATE, 23 )AS F_DATE_F, convert(varchar(12),getdate(),23) as TDATE,city_name,em.*,grp_code,GRP_HY_CODE,GM.SUP_DOWN_ID AS SDID FROM ENQ_MAIN em inner join city c on em.f_city=c.city_id inner join grp_main gm on gm.grp_id=em.grp_id WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID

Set.Name: ENQ_PRICE
Set.Sql: select bas_tag_name as pname,ENQ_PRICE_ID, NUM as snum, convert(varchar,round(SIG_PRICE,2)) as SIG_PRICE, convert(varchar,round(SIG_R_PRICE,2)) as SIG_R_PRICE, COIN,COIN_NAME,SC.COIN_PT, convert(varchar,round(isnull(num*sig_R_price,0),2)) as allprice FROM ENQ_PRICE EP INNER JOIN BAS_TAG BT ON EP.ENQ_ENTRY=BT.BAS_TAG AND BT.BAS_TAG_GRP='SER_ENTRY' INNER JOIN SYS_COIN SC ON SC.COIN_ID=EP.COIN WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID;

Set.Name: ENQ_SER
Set.Sql: SELECT ES.SER_ID,SER_NAME,ENQ_REMARK as E_REMARK FROM ENQ_SER ES INNER JOIN SER_MAIN SM ON ES.SER_ID=SM.SER_ID where SER_GROUP='SER_ENTRY1' AND ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID

Set.Name: ENQ_JNY
Set.Sql: SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY,ENQ_JNY_ID,WAY_CODE,ENQ_JNY_CONTENT,BT1.SER_KEY_NAME AS HNAME,BT2.SER_KEY_NAME AS MNAME , case when TRAFFIC='AIR' THEN dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'/')ELSE dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'-') END as way,convert(varchar(22) , ENQ_JNY_DATE,23)AS DT, '酒店名称：' +ISNULL(HOTEL_NAME,'未填写')+'。酒店详细信息：'+ISNULL(HOTEL_INFO,'未填写')+'。导游1：'+ISNULL(GUIDE_NAME1,'未填写')+'('+ISNULL(GUIDE_INFO1,' ')+')。'+'导游2：'+ISNULL(GUIDE_NAME2,'未填写')+'('+ISNULL(GUIDE_INFO2,' ')+')。' AS REM ,datename(weekday, ENQ_JNY_DATE) as WEED_DAY FROM ENQ_JNY ej left join SER_KEY bt1 on ej.hotel_id=BT1.SER_KEY_ID left join SER_KEY bt2 on ej.meal_id=BT2.SER_KEY_ID WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID order by ENQ_JNY_DAY

Set.Name: SUP
Set.Sql: SELECT SUP_NAME,SUP_FAX,SUP_TELE ,CRM_CUS_NAME,SUP_EMAIL,ADM_NAME,'电话：'+ADM_TELE+'/手机：'+ADM_MOBILE+'/邮箱：'+ADM_EMAIL as link FROM SUP_MAIN SM INNER JOIN CRM_CONN CC ON CC.SUP_DOWN_ID =SM.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CUS CS ON CC.CRM_COM_ID=CS.CRM_COM_ID inner join ADM_USER au on au.adm_id=cc.adm_id WHERE SM.SUP_ID=@SDID

Set.Name: SALES
Set.Sql: SELECT ADM_TELE ,ADM_MOBILE,ADM_EMAIL ,ADM_NAME FROM GRP_MAIN GM INNER JOIN ADM_USER au on au.adm_id=GM.adm_id WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID

Set.Name: subprice
Set.Sql:
select cast(sum(round(isnull(num*sig_R_price,0),2)) as varchar(20)) as subprice FROM ENQ_PRICE EP INNER JOIN BAS_TAG BT ON EP.ENQ_ENTRY=BT.BAS_TAG AND BT.BAS_TAG_GRP='SER_ENTRY' INNER JOIN SYS_COIN SC ON SC.COIN_ID=EP.COIN WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID group by enq_id; select cast(sum(round(isnull(sig_R_price,0),2)) as varchar(20)) as price_c_sig FROM ENQ_PRICE EP INNER JOIN BAS_TAG BT ON EP.ENQ_ENTRY=BT.BAS_TAG AND BT.BAS_TAG_GRP='SER_ENTRY' INNER JOIN SYS_COIN SC ON SC.COIN_ID=EP.COIN WHERE ENQ_ID=@enq_id group by enq_id;
select cast(sum(round(isnull(sig_R_price,0),2)) as varchar(20)) as price_n_sig FROM ENQ_PRICE EP INNER JOIN BAS_TAG BT ON EP.ENQ_ENTRY=BT.BAS_TAG AND BT.BAS_TAG_GRP='SER_ENTRY' INNER JOIN SYS_COIN SC ON SC.COIN_ID=EP.COIN WHERE ENQ_ID=@enq_id and ENQ_ENTRY<>'SER_ENTRY3' group by enq_id

Set.ReportTemplate: 路嘉华阳销售报价单

客户信息：
客户： @SUP_NAME 团号： @GRP_HY_CODE
联系人： @CRM_CUS_NAME 询价号： @enq_no
电话： @SUP_TELE 传真： @SUP_fax
邮箱： @SUP_EMAIL

销售人员信息：
销售： @ADM_NAME 联系电话： @ADM_TELE
邮箱： @ADM_EMAIL 手机号： @ADM_MOBILE

概述情况：
人数： @PEOPLE_NUM 小孩： @CHILD_NUM 小孩不占床： @CHILD_NO_NUM
婴儿： @BABY_NUM 天数： @DAY_NUM 领队： @HEAD_NUM
出发城市： @CITY_NAME 单人房： @SIG_NUM 双人房： @DUB_NUM
三人房： @THR_NUM 四人房： @FOR_NUM 套房： @SUIT_NUM
出发日期： @F_DATE_F 报价日期： @TDATE

费用明细：

服务费用

 数量 单价 货币 汇率 小计
@pname @snum @SIG_R_PRICE @COIN_NAME @COIN_PT @allprice
合计 @price_n_sig/@price_c_sig @subprice

费用概况：

服务费用

   不含单间差 含单间差   总计

单人价格

   @price_n_sig @price_c_sig   @subprice

地接服务价包括：
@SER_NAME： @E_REMARK

报价合同：

@SUP_NAME    （以下称甲方），系依照其本国法律设立的法人。具有接待中国公民来本国旅游的经营资格。总部设在                                                           。

华阳国际商务旅行社有限公司（以下称乙方），系依照中华人民共和国法律设立的法人，依法享有组织中国公民出国旅游的经营权。本部设在北京市建国门外大街22号赛特大厦406 邮编100004 电话010-65305258 传真：010-65305262。

甲、乙双方为发展共同的事业，本着平等互利的原则，经友好协商，为组织、接待中国公民赴美国旅游事宜，明确双方的权利义务，订立本合同。本合同和合同附件为不可分割的整体，合同正文与合同附件的条款具有同等的效力。

第一条 甲方同意将组织成行的旅游团交由乙方接待，乙方同意按照甲方所提出的接待标准，安排旅游团的旅行游览活动。

第二条 甲方应在旅游团进入乙方国境之日30天前向乙方预报团队信息；乙方应当在接到甲方预报2个工作日内予以确认。

甲方应当在旅游团离境之日前14个工作日内，以书面形式向乙方提供下列资料：

1.     接待标准；

2.     游程安排；

3.     旅游者名单（含姓名、性别、出生年月、职业、国籍、证件名称、号码）；

4.     所需房间数；

5.     入境航班或车次。

第三条 甲方应当在旅游团离境之日起十天前，用电汇方式把旅游团的全部旅行费用汇入乙方帐户，全或汇入乙方指定国内帐号，需现付的由甲方全陪直接现付，旅行费用以美元或人民币支付，乙方在收到款项之后于三个工作日之内提供与所付账户抬头一致的发票。

第四条 如甲方操作失误造成旅游团行程延误、更改、取消所产生的经济损失由甲方承担。

第五条 乙方应当按照本合同和合同附件约定的标准和日程安排为旅游团提供服务。除人力不可抗拒的因素外，如乙方未按约定的接待标准和日程安排向旅游团提供服务，应当提供补偿服务或将低于服务标准的费用差额退还甲方并赔偿由此造成的经济损失。除人力不可抗拒的因素外，如因乙方的原因变更旅行日程、交通工具、食宿标准等所增加的费用由乙方承担。

第六条 乙方应当为旅游团委派合格的有导游证的中文导游人员提供服务。乙方导游不得强迫或诱导旅游者购物；旅游者在乙方指定的商店购物，经鉴定，如属伪劣假冒商品或质价不符的，乙方有责任随时退换。乙方导游不得诱导旅游者涉足色情场所和赌毒场所，不得强迫旅游者参与自费项目。

第七条 甲方旅游团搭乘飞机、轮船、汽车或在饭店、餐厅等各项旅游设施（区）中受到损害，如不属乙方责任，但乙方应尽人道主义义务协助甲方处理；如属乙方责任，乙方应当承担损害赔偿责任。

第八条 甲方旅游团在进入乙方国境被阻时，除旅游者自身的原因外，乙方应当积极协助处理；如属乙方原因，乙方应当承担赔偿责任。

第九条 乙方未按接待标准为旅游团提供服务，造成旅游者经济损失，乙方应当承担赔偿责任；甲方有向乙方政府旅游管理机构投诉并要求赔偿的权利。

第十条 乙方如因特殊原因须调整双方已确认的旅游团报价，应当在旅游团进入乙方国境之日起3天前通知甲方。

第十一条 乙方有责任使甲方知晓乙方国家的法律和有关规定。甲方应当要求旅游者遵守乙方国家的法律和有关规定。

第十二条 乙方对团组的报价，经甲方书面认可后，作为本合同的附件。

第十三条 本合同的订立、变更、解除、解释、履行和争议的解决均受中华人民共和国法律的管辖。

第十四条 本合同一式两份，甲乙双方各执一份，具有相同效力。自双方签订之日起生效。本合同自双方签订之日起生效。

　

甲方：

 

乙方：华阳国际商务旅行社有限公司

报价说明：

@D_C_REMARK

@D_NC_REMARK

@ENQ_REMARK

行程安排：
天 日期 行程 说明
@ENQ_JNY_DAY  @DT 
(@weed_day)		 @WAY  @ENQ_JNY_CONTENT

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT PROFIT PT,* FROM ENQ_MAIN WHERE ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND @EWA_MTYPE='M' ;

Set.Name: OnModify SQL
OnPageLoad SQL2
X SQL
Set.Sql:
select ser_id,ser_name,b.* from ser_main a, (
select '数量' n , 'sl' k,0 a union select '单价' n , 'sup' k,20
) b
where ser_id in (select col from dbo.f_split(@ser_ids,',')) order by ser_id,a

Set.Name: Y SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT ej.enq_jny_id AS enq_jny_id, ENQ_JNY_DAY, CASE WHEN TRAFFIC='AIR' THEN '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY AS nvarchar(10))+'天('+dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,NULL,'/')+')' ELSE '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY AS nvarchar(10))+'天('+dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,NULL,'-')+')' END AS enq_jny_day1, sm.sup_id AS sid, sup_name FROM enq_jny ej INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB es ON ej.enq_jny_id =es.enq_jny_id AND es.enq_op_id=@enq_op_id INNER JOIN sup_main sm ON sm.sup_id=es.sup_down_id INNER JOIN sys_coin sc ON sc.coin_id=es.coin_id WHERE enq_id=@enq_id AND ej.enq_jny_id IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@enq_jny_ids,',')) AND sm.sup_id=@sup_id GROUP BY ej.enq_jny_id , ENQ_JNY_DAY, sm.sup_id, sup_name, way_code, TRAFFIC, F_ADD, TO_ADD, TO_ADD2 UNION ALL SELECT -1 ,999,'合计',null,null
ORDER BY ENQ_JNY_DAY

Set.Name: DATA SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT ser_id, 'op' n, gs.enq_jny_id, sup_down_id, sc.coin_id, CASE WHEN sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) =0 OR sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) IS NULL THEN '' ELSE cast(sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) AS varchar(10))+'/'+coin_key END p FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB gs INNER JOIN enq_jny gj ON gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id AND gs.enq_op_id=@enq_op_id INNER JOIN sys_coin sc ON sc.coin_id=gs.coin_id WHERE enq_id=@enq_id AND NOT sup_down_id IS NULL AND gs.sub_tag='auto' AND ser_id IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@ser_ids,',')) GROUP BY gs.enq_jny_id , gs.sup_down_id , ser_id, sc.coin_id, coin_key UNION SELECT ser_id, 'sup' n, gs.enq_jny_id, sup_down_id, sc.coin_id, CASE WHEN sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP) =0 OR sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP) IS NULL THEN '' ELSE cast(sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP) AS varchar(10))+'/'+coin_key END ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB gs INNER JOIN enq_jny gj ON gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id AND gs.enq_op_id=@enq_op_id INNER JOIN sys_coin sc ON sc.coin_id=gs.coin_id WHERE enq_id=@enq_id AND NOT sup_down_id IS NULL AND gs.sub_tag='auto' AND ser_id IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@ser_ids,',')) GROUP BY gs.enq_jny_id , gs.sup_down_id , ser_id, sc.coin_id, coin_key
UNION SELECT ser_id, 'sl' n, gs.enq_jny_id, sup_down_id, sc.coin_id, CASE WHEN sum(SUB_NUM) =0 OR sum(SUB_NUM) IS NULL THEN '' ELSE CAST(cast( sum(SUB_NUM) AS money) AS VARCHAR(10))
END NUM FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB gs INNER JOIN enq_jny gj ON gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id AND gs.enq_op_id=@enq_op_id INNER JOIN sys_coin sc ON sc.coin_id=gs.coin_id WHERE enq_id=@enq_id AND NOT sup_down_id IS NULL AND gs.sub_tag='auto' AND ser_id IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@ser_ids,',')) GROUP BY gs.enq_jny_id , gs.sup_down_id , ser_id, sc.coin_id, coin_key
UNION SELECT ser_id, 'sup' n, -1, null, null, CASE WHEN sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP) =0 OR sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP) IS NULL THEN '' ELSE CAST(cast( sum(SUB_NUM*ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP) AS INT) AS VARCHAR(10))+'/'+coin_key
END NUM FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB gs INNER JOIN enq_jny gj ON gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id AND gs.enq_op_id=@enq_op_id INNER JOIN sys_coin sc ON sc.coin_id=gs.coin_id WHERE enq_id=@enq_id AND NOT sup_down_id IS NULL AND gs.sub_tag='auto' AND ser_id IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@ser_ids,',')) GROUP BY SER_ID,COIN_KEY

1、供应商总计价格(不可修改)

2、变更要求

3、价格核算

*说明:
1.锁定后报价列不会再随修改行程和报价单儿变化

Set.Name: X SQL
Set.Sql: select * from ser_main where ser_id in ( SELECT SER_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID=B.ENQ_JNY_ID WHERE ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID ) AND sup_id=@g_sup_id

Set.Name: Y SQL
Set.Sql:
select * from ( select ej.enq_jny_id as enq_jny_id,ENQ_JNY_DAY,case when TRAFFIC='AIR' THEN '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as nvarchar(10))+'天('+dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'/')+')' ELSE '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as nvarchar(10))+'天('+dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'-')+')' END as enq_jny_day1,sm.sup_id as sid,sup_name from enq_jny ej inner join ENQ_JNY_SER_sub es on ej.enq_jny_id =es.enq_jny_id inner join sup_main sm on sm.sup_id=es.sup_down_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=es.coin_id where enq_id=@enq_id group by ej.enq_jny_id ,ENQ_JNY_DAY,sm.sup_id,sup_name,way_code,TRAFFIC,F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2
union all select -1 as enq_jny_id,-1 as ENQ_JNY_DAY,'合计/'+coin_key as enq_jny_id1, -1 as sid, '-' as sup_name from enq_main e inner join grp_main g on e.grp_id=g.grp_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=g.GRP_COIN where enq_id=@enq_id) aa
order by case when ENQ_JNY_DAY =-1 then 999999 else ENQ_JNY_DAY end

Set.Name: DATA SQL
Set.Sql:
select ser_id,gs.enq_jny_id,sup_down_id,sc.coin_id, case when sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) =0 or sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) is null then '' else cast(sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) as varchar(10))+'/'+coin_key end ENQ_JNY_PRICE from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=gs.coin_id where enq_id=@enq_id and not sup_down_id is null and gs.sub_tag='auto' group by gs.enq_jny_id ,gs.sup_down_id ,ser_id,sc.coin_id,coin_key
union all
select gs.ser_id,-1 as enq_jny_id ,-1 as sup_down_id ,GRP_COIN as coin_id,cast(isnull(SUM(dbo.f_getpricebycoin(g.grp_id,gs.COIN_ID,GRP_COIN,ISNULL(ENQ_JNY_PRICE,0.0))),0.0) as varchar(20))+'/'+coin_key as ENQ_JNY_PRICE from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join enq_main e on e.enq_id=gj.enq_id inner join grp_main g on e.grp_id=g.grp_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=GRP_COIN where gj.enq_id=@enq_id and gs.sub_tag='auto' group by gs.ser_id,GRP_COIN,coin_key

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ENQ_CREATE_TIME , A.* , B.ADM_NAME , c.allprice , c.PROFIT1,D.SUP_NAME , E.BAS_TAG_NAME GRP_RUN_MODEL_NAME , F.A1 , case when ENQ_STAR=0 or ENQ_STAR is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_STAR , case when ENQ_OP=0 or ENQ_OP is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_OP , case when ENQ_ING=0 or ENQ_ING is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_ING , CRM.CRM_COM_ID as COM_ID -- 避免和 CRM_COM_ID 参数冲突 r_crm2 调用 , OP.ADM_NAME AS OP FROM V_GRP_MAIN A LEFT JOIN ADM_USER B ON A.ADM_ID=B.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER OP ON A.OP_ID = OP.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID , sum(num*sig_price) as allprice , sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 FROM ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) c on a.enq_id = c.enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = D.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG E ON A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = E.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GRP_ID, COUNT(*) A1,max(ENQ_CREATE_TIME)as ENQ_CREATE_TIME FROM ENQ_MAIN where enq_state='USED' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) F ON A.GRP_ID=F.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN ( select grp_id, max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_ING' then num else 0 end ) as ENQ_ING , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_STAR' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_STAR , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_OP' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_OP from ( select grp_id,flow_state,count(*)as num from enq_main where enq_state='USED' group by grp_id,flow_state ) as gp group by grp_id ) AS KS ON A.GRP_ID=KS.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CRM ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = CRM.SUP_DOWN_ID AND (CRM.CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID or @CRM_COM_ID is null) AND CRM.SUP_UP_ID=@G_SUP_ID WHERE A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND (@SDID IS NULL OR A.SUP_DOWN_ID = @SDID) AND ((@CANCEL IS NULL and ISNULL(A.GRP_CANCEL,'')<>'YES') OR (@CANCEL IS NOT NULL AND A.GRP_CANCEL=@CANCEL)) AND (@CRM_COM_ID IS NULL OR CRM.CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID) -- r_crm2 调用 AND ( (A.ADM_ID=@G_ADM_ID AND @T=2) OR (GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_ENQUIRY' AND @T=90) OR (GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ' AND @T=91) OR (GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_OK' AND @T=92) OR ( -- 销售询价中/审批 @T = 10 AND GRP_STA IN ('SCM_GRP_STA_NEW', 'SCM_GRP_STA_ENQUIRY') AND ( (@DEP_ID IS NULL AND A.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID) OR (@DEP = 1 AND A.ADM_ID IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) ) OR ( A.GRP_STA IN ('SCM_GRP_STA_NEW', 'SCM_GRP_STA_ENQUIRY') AND @T=12) -- OP 询价中/审批 OR @T IS NULL ) AND ( @FILTER IS NULL OR ( @FILTER = '100' AND A.SUP_DOWN_ID in (@SUP_ID_SPLIT) AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL') ) ) AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR A.GRP_CDATE >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR A.GRP_CDATE <= @DT_END) AND A1 > 0 -- 询价单数量 AND (@T1='MY' AND A.OP_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR @T1 IS NULL) ) AS GP WHERE 1=1 order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql:
update GRP_MAIN set grp_state='DEL' WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID and sup_id=@g_sup_id and not exists( SELECT * FROM ( select top 1 1 a from grp_costumer where grp_id=@grp_id union select top 1 1 from grp_finance where grp_id=@grp_id union select top 1 1 from grp_pay_apply where grp_id=@grp_id ) AA );
select 1 a from GRP_MAIN where grp_state='DEL' AND GRP_ID = @GRP_ID

Set.Name: NEW_MENU_2019_SALES SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( -- new menu SALES ENQS 调用 /2019/index-2019-1.jsp SELECT ENQ_CREATE_TIME , A.* , B.ADM_NAME , c.allprice , c.PROFIT1,D.SUP_NAME , E.BAS_TAG_NAME GRP_RUN_MODEL_NAME , F.A1 , case when ENQ_STAR=0 or ENQ_STAR is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_STAR , case when ENQ_OP=0 or ENQ_OP is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_OP , case when ENQ_ING=0 or ENQ_ING is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_ING , CRM.CRM_COM_ID as COM_ID -- 避免和 CRM_COM_ID 参数冲突 r_crm2 调用 , OP.ADM_NAME AS OP FROM V_GRP_MAIN A LEFT JOIN ADM_USER OP ON A.OP_ID = OP.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID , sum(num*sig_price) as allprice , sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 FROM ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) c on a.enq_id = c.enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = D.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG E ON A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = E.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GRP_ID, COUNT(*) A1,max(ENQ_CREATE_TIME)as ENQ_CREATE_TIME FROM ENQ_MAIN where enq_state='USED' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) F ON A.GRP_ID=F.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN ( select grp_id, max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_ING' then num else 0 end ) as ENQ_ING , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_STAR' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_STAR , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_OP' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_OP from ( select grp_id,flow_state,count(*)as num from enq_main where enq_state='USED' group by grp_id,flow_state ) as gp group by grp_id ) AS KS ON A.GRP_ID=KS.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CRM ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = CRM.SUP_DOWN_ID AND (CRM.CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID or @CRM_COM_ID is null) AND CRM.SUP_UP_ID=@G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER B ON CRM.ADM_ID = B.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON B.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR A.GRP_CDATE >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR A.GRP_CDATE <= @DT_END) AND (GRP_TYPE = @GRP_TYPE or ( @GRP_TYPE is null)) AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( B.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR B.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (B.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR B.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP = @G_ADM_ID) ) ) AS GP WHERE 1=1 order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction1 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( -- new menu 调用 /2019/index-2019-1.jsp SELECT ENQ_CREATE_TIME , A.* , B.ADM_NAME , c.allprice , c.PROFIT1,D.SUP_NAME , E.BAS_TAG_NAME GRP_RUN_MODEL_NAME , F.A1 , case when ENQ_STAR=0 or ENQ_STAR is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_STAR , case when ENQ_OP=0 or ENQ_OP is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_OP , case when ENQ_ING=0 or ENQ_ING is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_ING , CRM.CRM_COM_ID as COM_ID -- 避免和 CRM_COM_ID 参数冲突 r_crm2 调用 , OP.ADM_NAME AS OP FROM V_GRP_MAIN A LEFT JOIN ADM_USER B ON A.ADM_ID=B.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER OP ON A.OP_ID = OP.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID , sum(num*sig_price) as allprice , sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 FROM ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) c on a.enq_id = c.enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = D.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG E ON A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = E.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GRP_ID, COUNT(*) A1,max(ENQ_CREATE_TIME)as ENQ_CREATE_TIME FROM ENQ_MAIN where enq_state='USED' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) F ON A.GRP_ID=F.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN ( select grp_id, max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_ING' then num else 0 end ) as ENQ_ING , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_STAR' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_STAR , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_OP' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_OP from ( select grp_id,flow_state,count(*)as num from enq_main where enq_state='USED' group by grp_id,flow_state ) as gp group by grp_id ) AS KS ON A.GRP_ID=KS.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CRM ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = CRM.SUP_DOWN_ID AND (CRM.CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID or @CRM_COM_ID is null) AND CRM.SUP_UP_ID=@G_SUP_ID WHERE A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR A.GRP_CDATE >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR A.GRP_CDATE <= @DT_END) AND (OP_ID = @OP_ID or (@OP_ID = -1 AND OP_ID is null)) ) AS GP WHERE 1=1 order by grp_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( -- new menu SALES ENQS 调用 /2019/index-2019-1.jsp SELECT ENQ_CREATE_TIME , A.* , B.ADM_NAME , c.allprice , c.PROFIT1,D.SUP_NAME , E.BAS_TAG_NAME GRP_RUN_MODEL_NAME , F.A1 , case when ENQ_STAR=0 or ENQ_STAR is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_STAR , case when ENQ_OP=0 or ENQ_OP is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_OP , case when ENQ_ING=0 or ENQ_ING is null then '无' else '有' end as ENQ_ING , CRM.CRM_COM_ID as COM_ID -- 避免和 CRM_COM_ID 参数冲突 r_crm2 调用 , OP.ADM_NAME AS OP FROM V_GRP_MAIN A LEFT JOIN ADM_USER OP ON A.OP_ID = OP.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID , sum(num*sig_price) as allprice , sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 FROM ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) c on a.enq_id = c.enq_id LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = D.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG E ON A.GRP_RUN_MODEL = E.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GRP_ID, COUNT(*) A1,max(ENQ_CREATE_TIME)as ENQ_CREATE_TIME FROM ENQ_MAIN where enq_state='USED' GROUP BY GRP_ID ) F ON A.GRP_ID=F.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN ( select grp_id, max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_ING' then num else 0 end ) as ENQ_ING , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_STAR' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_STAR , max(case flow_state when 'ENQ_OP' then num else 0 end) as ENQ_OP from ( select grp_id,flow_state,count(*)as num from enq_main where enq_state='USED' group by grp_id,flow_state ) as gp group by grp_id ) AS KS ON A.GRP_ID=KS.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_CONN CRM ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID = CRM.SUP_DOWN_ID AND (CRM.CRM_COM_ID = @CRM_COM_ID or @CRM_COM_ID is null) AND CRM.SUP_UP_ID=@G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER B ON CRM.ADM_ID = B.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN CRM_SALES_RELATION REL ON B.ADM_ID = REL.ADM_ID_DOWN WHERE A.grp_state = 'USED' AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_PID IS NULL AND NOT A.GRP_TYPE in ('GRP_CB', 'GRP_VIRTUAL', 'GRP_ZC') AND (@DT_START IS NULL OR A.GRP_SDATE >= @DT_START) AND (@DT_END IS NULL OR A.GRP_SDATE <= @DT_END) AND (GRP_TYPE = @GRP_TYPE or ( @GRP_TYPE is null)) AND ( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-ALL = '1' OR( @G_ADM_ACL.CRM-DEPT = '1' AND ( B.ADM_ID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR B.PID in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) OR REL.ADM_ID_UP in (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT) ) ) OR (B.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID OR B.PID=@G_ADM_ID OR REL.ADM_ID_UP = @G_ADM_ID) ) ) AS GP WHERE 1=1 order by grp_id desc

update GRP_MAIN SET GRP_CANCEL='YES' WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID and not exists( SELECT * FROM ( select top 1 1 a from grp_costumer where grp_id=@grp_id union select top 1 1 from grp_finance where grp_id=@grp_id union select top 1 1 from grp_pay_apply where grp_id=@grp_id ) AA );

Set.Sql: SELECT CASE WHEN GRP_SER_SP_TYPE = 'CUT' THEN GRP_SER_SP_PRICE * GRP_SER_SP_NUM * -1 ELSE GRP_SER_SP_PRICE * GRP_SER_SP_NUM END AS TOTAL, A.*, B.* , CASE WHEN ISNULL(B.STATUS, '') = 'OK' THEN 'Confirmed Incomes' WHEN ISNULL(B.STATUS, '') = 'WAIT' THEN 'Unconfirmed Incomes' ELSE 'Not beginning' END AS STA FROM GRP_SER_SP A LEFT JOIN V_CAMP_RECORD_SER_SP B ON A.GRP_SER_SP_ID = B.GRP_SER_SP_ID WHERE A.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID AND SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND SUP_DOWN_ID = @SUP_DOWN_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT GRP_HY_CODE,SUP_NAME,COIN_KEY ,A.GRP_ID,A.RELATE_SUP_ID,A.COIN_ID, PRICE1,PRICE2 FROM ( SELECT GRP_ID,RELATE_SUP_ID,A.COIN_ID,SUM(COS_PRICE)PRICE1 FROM GRP_FIN_TYPE A INNER JOIN HK_ACC_MAIN B ON B.SOURCE_ID=A.RELATE_SUP_ID GROUP BY GRP_ID,RELATE_SUP_ID,A.COIN_ID )A LEFT JOIN(SELECT C.GRP_ID, B.SOURCE_ID AS SUP_ID,A.COIN_ID,SUM(A.ACC_REC_PRICE) PRICE2 FROM HK_ACC_RECORD A INNER JOIN HK_ACC_MAIN B ON A.SOURCE_TABLE='GRP_PAY_APPLY' AND A.ACC_ID=B.ACC_ID INNER JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY C ON A.SOURCE_ID=C.APPLY_ID GROUP BY C.GRP_ID, B.SOURCE_ID,A.COIN_ID) B ON A.GRP_ID=B.GRP_ID AND A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID INNER JOIN GRP_MAIN C ON A.GRP_ID=C.GRP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=D.SUP_ID INNER JOIN SYS_COIN E ON A.COIN_ID=E.COIN_ID )AS TEMP WHERE (ISNULL(@GRP_ID,0)=0 AND 1=1) OR (ISNULL(@GRP_ID,0)>0 AND GRP_ID=@GRP_ID)

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT A.* ,K0.SER_KEY_NAME+' '+ISNULL(K1.SER_KEY_NAME,'')+' '+ISNULL(K2.SER_KEY_NAME,'') SER_DES ,ISNULL(K0.SER_KEY_NAME_EN,'')+' '+ISNULL(K1.SER_KEY_NAME_EN,'')+' '+ISNULL(K2.SER_KEY_NAME_EN,'') SER_DES_EN , C.CITY_NAME, D.COIN_NAME , F.ENQ_JNY_DATE ,'DAY'+CAST(F.ENQ_JNY_DAY AS VARCHAR(20)) JNY_DAY,G.SER_NAME , D1.COIN_NAME COIN_NAME_SUP , A.SUB_NUM*ENQ_JNY_PRICE as TOTAL , A.SUB_NUM*ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP as TOTAL_SUP ,CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='ENUS' THEN G.SER_NAME_EN ELSE G.SER_NAME END SER_NAME FROM (SELECT * FROM GRP_FIN_TYPE WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM='ENQ_OP_MAIN' AND RELATE_SUP_ID=@SUP_DOWN_ID)A0 INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A ON A.ENQ_OP_ID=A0.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K0 ON A.SER_KEY0=K0.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K1 ON A.SER_KEY1=K1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K2 ON A.SER_KEY2=K2.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID=B.ENQ_JNY_ID LEFT JOIN CITY C ON A.SER_CITY_ID=C.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN D ON A.COIN_ID=D.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN D1 ON A.COIN_ID_SUP=D1.COIN_ID
LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=E.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ENQ_JNY F ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID=F.ENQ_JNY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_MAIN G ON A.SER_ID=G.SER_ID
WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID --AND ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID ORDER BY F.ENQ_JNY_DAY

inner join sys_coin E on D.coin_id=E.coin_id group by d.sup_down_id,D.coin_id,E.COIN_KEY,A.GRP_ID,B.ENQ_ID) as tt where 1=1

Set.Name: X SQL
Set.Sql: select * from ser_main where SUP_ID=@g_sup_id and ser_id in ( select ser_id from ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB where enq_jny_id in( select enq_jny_id from enq_jny where enq_id=@enq_id) group by ser_id ) order by ser_id

Set.Name: Y SQL
Set.Sql:
select * from ( select ej.enq_jny_id as enq_jny_id,ENQ_JNY_DAY,case when TRAFFIC='AIR' THEN '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as nvarchar(10))+'天('+dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'/')+')' ELSE '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as nvarchar(10))+'天('+dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'-')+')' END as enq_jny_day1,sm.sup_id as sid,sup_name,sc.coin_id,sc.coin_key from enq_jny ej inner join ENQ_JNY_SER_sub es on ej.enq_jny_id =es.enq_jny_id inner join sup_main sm on sm.sup_id=es.sup_down_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=es.coin_id where enq_id=@enq_id group by ej.enq_jny_id ,ENQ_JNY_DAY,sm.sup_id,sup_name,way_code,TRAFFIC,F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,sc.coin_id,sc.coin_key union all
SELECT -10*gs.COIN_ID enq_jny_id,-10*gs.COIN_ID as ENQ_JNY_DAY,'小计/'+sc.coin_key as enq_jny_id1, -1 as sid, '-' as sup_name,gs.coin_id, sc.coin_key from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join enq_main e on e.enq_id=gj.enq_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=gs.COIN_ID where gj.enq_id=@ENQ_ID GROUP BY gs.COIN_ID, sc.coin_key
union all select -1 as enq_jny_id,-1 as ENQ_JNY_DAY,'合计/'+coin_key as enq_jny_id1, -1 as sid, '-' as sup_name,sc.coin_id, sc.coin_key from enq_main e inner join grp_main g on e.grp_id=g.grp_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=g.GRP_COIN where enq_id=@enq_id) aa
order by case when ENQ_JNY_DAY =-1 then 999999 when ENQ_JNY_DAY <-9 then 888888 else ENQ_JNY_DAY end

Set.Name: DATA SQL
Set.Sql:
select ser_id,gs.enq_jny_id,sup_down_id,sc.coin_id, replace( case when sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) =0 or sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) is null then '' else '[预]' + cast(sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) as varchar(10)) + ' x ' + convert(varchar,max(SUB_NUM)) + ' = ' + convert(varchar,sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * sub_num)) +'/'+coin_key end,'.00','' ) ENQ_JNY_PRICE
from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=gs.coin_id where enq_id=@enq_id and not sup_down_id is null and gs.sub_tag='auto' group by gs.enq_jny_id ,gs.sup_down_id ,ser_id,sc.coin_id,coin_key
union all
SELECT SER_ID,-10*COIN_ID enq_jny_id,-1 as sup_down_id,COIN_ID, convert(varchar,SUM(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * SUB_NUM)) ENQ_JNY_PRICE from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join enq_main e on e.enq_id=gj.enq_id where gj.enq_id=@ENQ_ID GROUP BY COIN_ID, SER_ID
union all
SELECT SER_ID, -1 as enq_jny_id ,-1 as sup_down_id ,GRP_COIN as coin_id , CONVERT(VARCHAR,SUM(P1*GRP_POINT)) ENQ_JNY_PRICE FROM ( SELECT E.GRP_ID, COIN_ID, SER_ID, SUM(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * SUB_NUM) P1 from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join enq_main e on e.enq_id=gj.enq_id where gj.enq_id=@ENQ_ID GROUP BY E.GRP_ID, COIN_ID, SER_ID ) A inner join grp_main g on A.grp_id=g.grp_id INNER JOIN GRP_COIN H ON A.GRP_ID=H.GRP_ID AND H.COIN_FROM=A.COIN_ID AND H.COIN_TO=G.GRP_COIN inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=GRP_COIN GROUP BY SER_ID,GRP_COIN,coin_key

Set.Name: enq_op_main sql
Set.Sql:
SELECT a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID ,a.SER_ID,a.SUP_DOWN_ID,a.SUB_NUM, bb.ENQ_OP_ID, bb.ENQ_OP_STATE, bb.SELECT_STATE,b.enq_jny_price_sup,a.enq_jny_id,b.enq_jny_price,b.sup_down_id vid,b.sub_num vnum,d.sup_name,e.coin_key FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB B ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID=b.ENQ_JNY_ID
AND ((a.SER_CITY_ID=b.SER_CITY_ID AND isnull(a.SER_KEY0,-1)=isnull(b.SER_KEY0 ,-1) AND isnull(a.SER_KEY1,-1)=isnull(b.SER_KEY1 ,-1) AND isnull(a.SER_KEY2,-1)=isnull(b.SER_KEY2,-1)) or(a.SER_CONN_ID=b.SER_CONN_ID)) INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN bb ON b.ENQ_OP_ID=bb.ENQ_OP_ID inner join enq_main c on bb.enq_id=c.enq_id AND BB.ENQ_OP_STATE='USED' left join sup_main d on b.sup_down_id=d.sup_id left join sys_coin e on b.coin_id_sup=e.coin_id WHERE bb.enq_id=@enq_id

Set.Sql: SELECT ADM_ID ,ADM_NAME FROM (SELECT * FROM ACC_TITLE WHERE ACC_TIT_PID IN(SELECT ACC_TIT_ID FROM ACC_TITLE WHERE ACC_TIT_CODE=100301))AS A INNER JOIN ADM_USER B ON A.GRP_ID=B.ADM_ID AND ADM_USR_STA_TAG='OK' AND B.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID ORDER BY ADM_NAME

select a.ser_id, a.ser_name, a.ser_name_en from ser_main a left join ( -- 下级供应商的询价单 select distinct a.SER_ID from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id where b.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id and b.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ) b on a.ser_id = b.ser_id inner join ( -- 自己 select DISTINCT a.SER_ID, a.SUP_ID from ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a inner join enq_jny b on a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID ) c on a.ser_id = c.ser_id where (c.sup_id=@g_sup_id or b.ser_id >0) order by ser_id

SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY AS ed, 'D' + cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY AS varchar(10)) + ' [' + dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD, TO_ADD, TO_ADD2, CITY_ID, case when TRAFFIC='AIR' then '/' else '-' end) + ']' AS ENQ_JNY_DAY, ENQ_JNY_ID FROM ENQ_JNY a left join (-- 下级供应商的询价单 select distinct a.enq_jny_id jny_id from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id where b.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id and b.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_jny_id = b.jny_id WHERE a.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID and (a.sup_id = @g_sup_id or b.jny_id >0) ORDER BY ed

Set.Name: X SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT a.SER_ID, sm.SER_NAME, a.SER_KEY_NAME0 + CASE WHEN a.ser_key1 > 0 THEN '
' + SER_KEY_NAME1 ELSE '' END + CASE WHEN a.ser_key2 > 0 THEN '
' + SER_KEY_NAME2 ELSE '' END AS ser_names, convert(varchar, a.SER_KEY0) + '~' + convert(varchar, a.SER_KEY1) + '~' + convert(varchar, a.SER_KEY2) AS ser_keys, sm.ser_ord, isnull(bt.bas_tag_ord, 99999999) bas_tag_ord FROM v_enq_jny_ser_sub a INNER JOIN ser_main sm ON a.ser_id = sm.SER_ID inner join ser_key sk on a.SER_KEY1 = sk.ser_key_id left join bas_tag bt on sk.SER_KEY_EX3 = bt.bas_tag -- 根据标准服务创建 WHERE a.enq_id = @enq_id AND a.sup_id = @g_sup_id ) a WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY a.ser_ord, a.bas_tag_ord, a.ser_names

Set.Name: Y SQL
Set.Sql:
select * from ( select ej.enq_jny_id as enq_jny_id , ej.ENQ_JNY_DAY , case when TRAFFIC='AIR' THEN '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as nvarchar(10)) + '天(' + dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'/') +')' ELSE '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as nvarchar(10)) + '天(' + dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'-') +')' END + '
' + convert(varchar, ej.enq_jny_date,111) + '/' + case when datepart(weekday, ej.enq_jny_date) = 1 then '周日' when datepart(weekday, ej.enq_jny_date) = 2 then '周一' when datepart(weekday, ej.enq_jny_date) = 3 then '周二' when datepart(weekday, ej.enq_jny_date) = 4 then '周三' when datepart(weekday, ej.enq_jny_date) = 5 then '周四' when datepart(weekday, ej.enq_jny_date) = 6 then '周五' else '周六' end as enq_jny_day1 , sc.coin_id , sc.coin_name as coin_key , ej.SER_CITY_ID , c.city_name from v_enq_jny_ser_sub ej inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id= ej.COIN_ID left join city c on ej.ser_city_id = c.city_id WHERE ej.enq_id = @enq_id and ej.sup_id = @g_sup_id group by ej.enq_jny_id , ENQ_JNY_DAY , TRAFFIC , F_ADD , TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,sc.coin_id,sc.coin_name , ej.SER_CITY_ID,c.city_name,enq_jny_date union all SELECT -10 * sc.COIN_ID enq_jny_id , -10 * sc.COIN_ID as ENQ_JNY_DAY , '合计/'+sc.coin_name as enq_jny_id1 , sc.COIN_ID , sc.coin_name as coin_key , -1 , '' from v_enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=gs.COIN_ID where gs.enq_id = @enq_id and gs.sup_id = @g_sup_id GROUP BY sc.COIN_ID, sc.coin_name ) aa order by case when ENQ_JNY_DAY =-1 then 999999 when ENQ_JNY_DAY <-9 then 888888 else ENQ_JNY_DAY end

Set.Name: DATA SQL
Set.Sql: select ser_id , convert(varchar, gs.SER_KEY0) + '~' + convert(varchar, gs.SER_KEY1) + '~' + convert(varchar, gs.SER_KEY2) AS ser_keys , gs.enq_jny_id , sc.coin_id , gs.ser_city_id , gs.enq_jny_ser_sub_id , replace( case when ENQ_JNY_PRICE =0 or ENQ_JNY_PRICE is null then '' else '[预]' + cast(ENQ_JNY_PRICE as varchar(10)) + ' x ' + convert(varchar,SUB_NUM) + ' = ' + convert(varchar, ENQ_JNY_PRICE * sub_num) end,'.00','' ) ENQ_JNY_PRICE from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=gs.coin_id where enq_id=@enq_id and not sup_down_id is null and gs.sub_tag='auto' and gs.sup_id = @g_sup_id

Set.Name: enq_op_main sql
Set.Sql: SELECT a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID , a.SER_ID , a.SUP_DOWN_ID , a.SUB_NUM , bb.ENQ_OP_ID , bb.ENQ_OP_STATE , bb.SELECT_STATE , b.enq_jny_price_sup , a.enq_jny_id , b.enq_jny_price , b.sup_down_id AS vid , b.sub_num AS vnum , d.sup_name , e.coin_key , e.COIN_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB B ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID AND ( ( a.SER_CITY_ID = b.SER_CITY_ID AND isnull(a.SER_KEY0, -1) = isnull(b.SER_KEY0, -1) AND isnull(a.SER_KEY1, -1) = isnull(b.SER_KEY1, -1) AND isnull(a.SER_KEY2, -1) = isnull(b.SER_KEY2, -1) ) OR a.SER_CONN_ID = b.SER_CONN_ID ) INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN bb ON b.ENQ_OP_ID = bb.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN enq_main c ON bb.enq_id = c.enq_id AND BB.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' LEFT JOIN sup_main d ON b.sup_down_id = d.sup_id LEFT JOIN sys_coin e ON b.coin_id_sup = e.coin_id WHERE bb.enq_id = @enq_id

Set.Name: loadGrpSta
Set.Sql: SELECT GRP_STA FROM GRP_MAIN WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID;

Set.Name: OnPagePost SQL
CITYS
Set.Sql:
SELECT CITY_ID ,A.CITY_NAME,A.CITY_NAME_EN,AA FROM CITY A LEFT JOIN ( select CID,COUNT(*) AA from [V_ENQ_JNY_CITYS] WHERE CID=@cid group by CID ) B ON A.CITY_ID=B.CID WHERE A.COUNTRY_ID=@cid AND A.COUNTRY_ID<>A.CITY_ID
ORDER BY AA DESC, A.CITY_HOT DESC ,A.CITY_NAME

Set.Name: createGyapDoc
importJny
GetEnqId SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT TOP 1 ENQ_ID FROM_ENQ_ID FROM GRP_GYAP_DOC A INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN B ON B.GRP_ID=case when @IMP_JNY='GRP' then A.GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID else A.GRP_ID end WHERE A.GRP_GYAP_ID=@GRP_GYAP_ID AND (B.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' OR ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE') AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ORDER BY ENQ_SELECT_STATE desc ;
SELECT TOP 1 ENQ_ID TO_ENQ_ID FROM ENQ_MAIN B WHERE B.GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND (B.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' OR ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE') AND B.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ORDER BY ENQ_SELECT_STATE desc ;

Set.Name: fromOpportunity

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT a.* FROM ( SELECT A.SER_KEY_ID, A.SER_CONN_ID, A.SUP_ID, A.OWN_SUP_ID, A.SER_ID, A.CITY_NAME+'/'+F.CITY_NAME CITY_NAME, A.COIN_ID, A.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SER_KEY_NAME2, A.SER_NAME, A.SER_GROUP, A.SER_CONN_CREATE_TIME, A.SER_CONN_STATE, A.SER_CERT, A.SER_CERT_end, B.BAS_TAG_NAME SER_CERT_NAME, A.SER_CONN_SDATE, A.SER_CONN_EDATE , isnull(A.SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME,A.SER_CONN_CREATE_TIME) SER_CONN_LTIME, isnull(D.ADM_NAME,C.ADM_NAME) SER_CONN_LADM, C.ADM_NAME, CASE WHEN PPL_NUM>0 THEN PPL_NUM ELSE NULL END PPL_NUM, SM.SER_TAG, sup.sup_name, ref_sup.SUP_STAR, ref.ser_price as ref_price, -- 来源的采购价格 ref_sup.sup_name as ref_sup_name, -- 来源的供应商 a.ser_price - ref.ser_price as diff_conn, ej.ENQ_JNY_DATE, isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,ENQ_JNY_PRICE) SER_PRICE, isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,ENQ_JNY_PRICE) - ref.ser_price diff, ref.ser_price * gc.grp_point rmb_ref_price, ((isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,ENQ_JNY_PRICE)) - ref.ser_price) * gc.grp_point rmb_diff, isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,ENQ_JNY_PRICE) * gc.grp_point rmb_ser_price, sub_num, ((isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,ENQ_JNY_PRICE)) - ref.ser_price) * gc.grp_point * sub_num rmb_diff_total, ((isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,ENQ_JNY_PRICE)) - ref.ser_price) * gc.grp_point * sub_num/PEOPLE_NUM rmb_diff_person, 1 RMB_COIN FROM V_SER_SET_ROB a INNER JOIN SER_MAIN SM ON A.SER_ID = SM.SER_ID LEFT JOIN BAS_TAG B ON A.SER_CERT = B.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ADM_USER C ON A.ADM_ID = C.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER D ON A.SER_CONN_UPDATE_ADM=D.ADM_ID INNER JOIN CITY E ON A.CITY_ID=E.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN CITY F ON E.COUNTRY_ID=F.CITY_ID inner join sup_main sup on a.own_sup_id = sup.sup_id inner join ser_conn ref on a.ref_ser_conn_id = ref.ser_conn_id inner join sup_main ref_sup on ref.sup_id = ref_sup.sup_id inner join ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB ss on a.ser_conn_id = ss.ser_conn_id inner join enq_jny ej on ej.enq_jny_id=ss.enq_jny_id inner join enq_main em on ej.enq_id=em.enq_id inner join grp_main gm on ej.grp_id=gm.grp_id inner join grp_coin gc on gc.GRP_ID=gm.grp_id and a.coin_id=gc.coin_from and ISNULL(gm.GRP_COIN,1)=gc.coin_to WHERE a.own_sup_id=@G_SUP_ID and ej.enq_id=@enq_id ) a WHERE 1=1 order by ser_conn_id desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT a.* FROM ( SELECT A.SER_KEY_ID, A.SER_CONN_ID, A.SUP_ID, A.OWN_SUP_ID, A.SER_ID , A.CITY_NAME + '/' + F.CITY_NAME AS CITY_NAME, A.SER_PRICE , A.COIN_ID, A.SER_KEY_NAME, A.SER_KEY_NAME2, A.SER_NAME, A.SER_GROUP , A.SER_CONN_CREATE_TIME, A.SER_CONN_STATE, A.SER_CERT, A.SER_CERT_end, A.SER_CONN_SDATE , A.SER_CONN_EDATE, isnull(SER_CONN_UPDATE_TIME, SER_CONN_CREATE_TIME) AS SER_CONN_LTIME , isnull(D.ADM_NAME, C.ADM_NAME) AS SER_CONN_LADM, C.ADM_NAME , CASE WHEN PPL_NUM > 0 THEN PPL_NUM ELSE NULL END AS PPL_NUM, sup.SUP_NAME, sub.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP FROM V_SER_SET_ROB a LEFT JOIN ADM_USER C ON A.ADM_ID = C.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ADM_USER D ON A.SER_CONN_UPDATE_ADM = D.ADM_ID INNER JOIN CITY E ON A.CITY_ID = E.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN CITY F ON E.COUNTRY_ID = F.CITY_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN sup ON a.sup_id = sup.sup_id inner join ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB sub on sub.SER_ID = a.ser_id and sub.SER_CITY_ID = a.CITY_ID and sub.SER_KEY0 = a.SER_KEY0 and sub.ser_key1 = a.SER_KEY1 and sub.ser_key2 = a.ser_key2 and sub.SUP_DOWN_ID = a.SUP_ID inner join enq_op_main op on sub.enq_op_id = op.enq_op_id and op.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' inner join enq_main em on op.enq_id = em.enq_id WHERE a.SER_CONN_STATE = 'USED' and em.grp_id = @grp_id ) a WHERE 1 = 1

Set.Sql: SELECT * from ( SELECT A.* , sm.sup_name , purchase.sup_name as purchase_sup_name , gm.grp_hy_code , am.adm_name , confirm.sup_name as confirm_sup_name , confirm_adm.adm_name as confirm_adm_name FROM GRP_SER_SP_MAIN A left join sup_main sm on a.SUP_down_id = sm.sup_id left join sup_main purchase on a.sup_id = purchase.sup_id left join grp_main gm on a.grp_id = gm.grp_id left join sup_main confirm on a.confirm_sup_id = confirm.SUP_ID left join adm_user confirm_adm on a.confirm_adm_id = confirm_adm.adm_id left join adm_user am on a.adm_id = am.adm_id WHERE 1=1 -- @ewa_test @is_supply is null and a.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- @ewa_test @is_supply is no null and a.SUP_down_id = @G_SUP_ID -- @ewa_test AND A.GSSM_STATUS = CASE WHEN @EWA_RECYCLE='1' THEN 'DEL' ELSE 'USED' END -- ewa_test @enq_op_id is not null and a.enq_op_id = @enq_op_id -- ewa_test @only_wait is not null and a.confirm_adm_id is null -- ewa_test ) aa WHERE 1 = 1 order by GSSM_ID desc

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID , A.ENQ_JNY_ID , SER_CONN_ID , B.SER_NAME + ' ' + ISNULL(K0.SER_KEY_NAME, '') + ' ' + ISNULL(K1.SER_KEY_NAME, '') AS SER_ID , ENQ_JNY_PRICE , A.SUP_DOWN_ID , COIN_ID , SUB_NUM , SER_SCALE , ENQ_JNY_PRICE * SUB_NUM AS price, ENQ_JNY_SER_REMARK , CASE WHEN SUB_TAG = 'AUTO' AND ENQ_OTHER_SER_ID = -1 THEN '原始服务' WHEN SUB_TAG IS NULL AND ENQ_OTHER_SER_ID > 0 THEN '附加服务' ELSE '来源不明' END AS SUB_TAG , sm.sup_name FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB A INNER JOIN SER_MAIN B ON A.SER_ID = B.SER_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY ej ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = ej.ENQ_JNY_ID AND ej.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K0 ON A.SER_KEY0 = K0.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K1 ON A.SER_KEY1 = K1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN sup_main sm ON a.sup_down_id = sm.sup_id WHERE A.sup_id = @g_sup_id -- ewa_test @ENQ_JNY_ID is not null AND A.ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID -- ewa_test @sup_down_id is not null AND (sup_down_id = @sup_down_id ) -- ewa_test @ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID is not null AND A.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = @ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID -- ewa_test @ser_id is not null AND a.ser_id = @ser_id -- ewa_test

Set.Sql: SELECT A.*, A.SUB_NUM * A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE AS TOTAL, K0.SER_KEY_NAME + ' ' + ISNULL(K1.SER_KEY_NAME, '') SER_DES, JNY.ENQ_JNY_DATE, JNY.ENQ_JNY_DAY, JNY.WAY_CODE, CT.CITY_NAME, CT.CITY_NAME_EN FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY JNY ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = JNY.ENQ_JNY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K0 ON A.SER_KEY0 = K0.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K1 ON A.SER_KEY1 = K1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN CITY CT ON A.SER_CITY_ID = CT.CITY_ID WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND JNY.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND A.SER_ID IN (@SER_IDS_split ) AND A.ENQ_JNY_ID IN (@ENQ_JNY_IDS_split ) ORDER BY JNY.ENQ_JNY_DAY, a.SER_ID

Set.Name: 2024-10-15 jzp 注释，貌似都没用了
OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
-- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO select enq_jny_id as enq_jny_ids , ser_ids, SUP_ID,STATE ENQ_OP_MAIN_STATE from enq_op_main where enq_op_id = @enq_op_id ;
with order_sub as ( select a.*, changes.* from V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A left join( -- 修改和删除的变更 select a.fro_enq_op_sub_id, coin_id order_change_coin , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_NUM) as order_change_num , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_PRICE) as order_change_price , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_PRICE * GRP_SER_SP_NUM) as order_change_total , count(*) as order_wait_num -- 未确认变更单总数 from GRP_SER_SP a WHERE a.GRP_SER_SP_REFID = @enq_op_id and a.GRP_SER_SP_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' and a.GRP_SER_SP_CONFIRMED is null -- 未确认 group by fro_enq_op_sub_id, coin_id ) changes on changes.fro_enq_op_sub_id = a.enq_op_sub_id WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.ENQ_OP_ID = @ENQ_OP_ID and (a.SUB_NUM != 0 or a.SUB_NUM is null) ), SER_SUB as ( -- 此订单的所有日程和服务的清单，包含新增的服务 SELECT a.*, changes.* from V_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a left join ( -- 新增和修改的服务关连 select a.FRO_SER_CITY_ID, a.FRO_SER_ID, a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY, a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX, coin_id ser_change_coin , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_NUM) as ser_change_num , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_PRICE) as ser_change_price , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_PRICE * GRP_SER_SP_NUM) as ser_change_total , count(*) as ser_wait_num -- 未确认变更单总数 from GRP_SER_SP a WHERE a.GRP_SER_SP_REFID = @enq_op_id and a.GRP_SER_SP_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' and a.GRP_SER_SP_CONFIRMED is null -- 未确认 group by a.FRO_SER_CITY_ID, a.FRO_SER_ID, a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY, a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX, coin_id ) changes on a.enq_jny_day = changes.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY and a.SER_ID = changes.FRO_SER_ID and a.SER_CITY_ID = changes.FRO_SER_CITY_ID and a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX = changes.FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX WHERE a.ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE' -- 当前选中的询价单 and a.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID and a.SUB_NUM != 0 and a.enq_jny_id in ( select col from dbo.f_split(@enq_jny_ids, ',') ) and a.SER_ID in ( select col from dbo.f_split(@ser_ids, ',') ) ), alldata as ( SELECT case -- 新增，变更单的数量和询价单的数量差异 when a.SUB_NUM is null then SER_SUB.SUB_NUM -- 删除，变更单的数量（负值）和原订单的之和 when SER_SUB.enq_jny_ser_sub_id is null then a.SUB_NUM + isnull(a.order_change_num, 0) -- 修改 when a.order_change_num is not null then SER_SUB.SUB_NUM - (a.order_change_num + a.SUB_NUM) else SER_SUB.SUB_NUM - a.SUB_NUM end as num_diff -- 询价单数量和（订单+变更单的差异） , isnull(a.order_wait_num, SER_SUB.ser_wait_num) as wait_num -- 待处理变更单数量 , isnull(SER_SUB.ser_change_num, a.order_change_num) as change_num -- 变更数量 , isnull(SER_SUB.ser_change_price, a.order_change_price) order_change_price -- 变更价格 , isnull(SER_SUB.ser_change_total, a.order_change_total) order_change_total -- 变更总价 , isnull(SER_SUB.ser_change_coin, a.order_change_coin) order_change_coin -- 变更货币 , A.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID , A.ENQ_OP_ID , A.SUB_NUM AS SUB_NUM_SUP -- 采购数量 , isnull(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE) as ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP -- 采购单价 , A.COIN_ID_SUP -- 采购货币 , (A.SUB_NUM - isnull(A.EOMS_FREE, 0)) * isnull(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE) as TOTAL_SUP -- 采购总计 , A.EOMS_FREE --免额 , SER_SUB.SUB_NUM -- 预算数量 , SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_PRICE -- 预算单价 , SER_SUB.COIN_ID -- 预算货币 , , SER_SUB.SUB_NUM * SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_PRICE as TOTAL -- 预算总价 , SER_SUB.SER_KEY_DES SER_SUB_DES -- 询价单服务描述 , A.SER_KEY_DES ORDER_DES -- 订单服务描述 , isnull(SER_SUB.SER_CITY_ID, A.SER_CITY_ID) as SER_CITY_ID , E.SUP_NAME , isnull(ser_sub.ENQ_JNY_DATE, a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE) as ENQ_JNY_DATE , ser_sub.ENQ_JNY_DATE as ser_sub_date , a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE as order_date , isnull(A.SER_ID, SER_SUB.SER_ID) as SER_ID , isnull(isnull(A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP, A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE) * A.SUB_NUM,0) - isnull(SER_SUB.SUB_NUM * SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_PRICE, 0) as COST_CHANGE , case when SER_SUB.SUB_NUM is null then 'DELETE' when a.SUB_NUM is null then 'INSERT' when SER_SUB.SUB_NUM = A.SUB_NUM -- 数量相同 and a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE = ser_sub.ENQ_JNY_DATE -- 日期一致 and a.SER_KEY0 = ser_sub.SER_KEY0 and a.SER_KEY1 = ser_sub.SER_KEY1 and a.SER_KEY1 = ser_sub.SER_KEY1 THEN '' -- 日期相同 else 'UPDATE' end as modified_status , case when SER_SUB.SUB_NUM = A.SUB_NUM -- 数量相同 and a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE = ser_sub.ENQ_JNY_DATE -- 日期一致 and a.SER_KEY0 = ser_sub.SER_KEY0 and a.SER_KEY1 = ser_sub.SER_KEY1 and a.SER_KEY1 = ser_sub.SER_KEY1 THEN '' -- 日期相同 else 'COM_YES' end as modified , SER_SUB.ENQ_ID as CUR_ENQ_ID , a.FRO_ENQ_ID as ORDER_ENQ_ID , a.ENQ_NO as ORDER_ENQ_NO , SER_SUB.ENQ_NO , a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY , SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID , SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_ID , A.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX , SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX FROM order_sub a LEFT JOIN SER_SUB ON -- 当前有效的询价单，不能用full join，因为服务有可能被其它供应商提供 SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_DAY = a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY -- 按照天的顺序一致 AND A.SER_CITY_ID = SER_SUB.SER_CITY_ID -- 服务所在城市一致 AND A.SER_ID = SER_SUB.SER_ID -- 服务一致 AND A.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX = SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX -- 服务顺序一致 -- AND A.SER_KEY0 = SER_SUB.SER_KEY0 -- AND A.SER_KEY1 = SER_SUB.SER_KEY1 -- AND A.SER_KEY2 = SER_SUB.SER_KEY2 AND SER_SUB.ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE' -- 当前有效询价单 AND A.FRO_GRP_ID = SER_SUB.GRP_ID --团号一致 LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN E ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=E.SUP_ID ) select * from ( select a.* , case when num_diff = 0 then 'ORD_CHG_EQUALS' when num_diff >0 then 'ORD_CHG_MORE' when num_diff < 0 then 'ORD_CHG_LESS' end as change_status from alldata a )sss where 1=1 -- ewa_test @only_changes is not null and @DELETES_SPLIT is null AND modified_status !='' AND isnull(wait_num,0) = 0 -- ewa_test @DELETES_SPLIT is not null and ENQ_OP_SUB_ID in (@DELETES_SPLIT) -- ewa_test order by modified_status desc

Set.Name: ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID , C.SELECT_STATE , C.FLOW_STATE , B.ENQ_JNY_DAY , A.SER_KEY0 , A.SER_KEY1 , A.SER_KEY2 , A.SER_CITY_ID , D.SUP_NAME , D.SUP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY B ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID=B.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN C ON C.ENQ_OP_ID=A.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN D ON C.SUP_ID = D.SUP_ID WHERE C.ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID AND ENQ_OP_STATE='USED'

Set.Name: CheckError SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * from ( SELECT top 1 EWA_ERR_OUT from ( SELECT '流程已开始，不能删除' EWA_ERR_OUT from ENQ_OP_MAIN where ENQ_OP_ID IN (SELECT ENQ_OP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE ENQ_OP_SUB_ID in (@ids_split)) AND FLOW_STATE!='FLOW_OP' AND isnull(SUP_TYPE,'')<>'SUP_GRD_ORD' union SELECT '询价被选中，不能删除报价' EWA_ERR_OUT from ENQ_OP_MAIN where ENQ_OP_ID IN (SELECT ENQ_OP_ID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE ENQ_OP_SUB_ID in (@ids_split)) AND ISNULL(SELECT_STATE,'')='CHECKED_TRUE' ) x ) k where 1=1

DELETE FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE ENQ_OP_SUB_ID in (@ids_split) AND exists (select 1 from enq_op_main x where x.ENQ_OP_ID=ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB.ENQ_OP_ID and x.STATE='ENQ_NEW' and x.ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID ) AND SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID

SELECT a.crm_com_name AS new_sup_name, a.CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS, CASE WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS IS NULL THEN 'COM_YES' WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS = '' THEN 'COM_YES' WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS = 'COOP_STATUS_PARTNER' THEN 'COM_YES' ELSE 'COM_NO' END AS ENQ_OP_IS_COOP FROM crm_com a INNER JOIN crm_conn b ON a.crm_com_id = b.crm_com_id WHERE b.sup_down_id = @sup_id AND b.sup_up_id = @G_SUP_ID

select a.ser_id, a.ser_name, a.ser_name_en from ser_main a left join ( -- 下级供应商的询价单 select distinct a.SER_ID from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id where b.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id and b.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ) b on a.ser_id = b.ser_id inner join ( -- 自己 select DISTINCT a.SER_ID, a.SUP_ID from ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a inner join enq_jny b on a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID ) c on a.ser_id = c.ser_id where (c.sup_id=@g_sup_id or b.ser_id >0) order by ser_id

SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY AS ed, 'D' + cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY AS varchar(10)) + ' [' + dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD, TO_ADD, TO_ADD2, CITY_ID, case when TRAFFIC='AIR' then '/' else '-' end) + ']' AS ENQ_JNY_DAY, ENQ_JNY_ID FROM ENQ_JNY a left join (-- 下级供应商的询价单 select distinct a.enq_jny_id jny_id from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id where b.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id and b.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_jny_id = b.jny_id WHERE a.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID and (a.sup_id = @g_sup_id or b.jny_id >0) ORDER BY ed

Set.Bottom: 预估价格

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT DRLR*0.35 AS OPLR, DRLR*0.65 AS SLLR, * FROM ( SELECT num*sig_price as allprice , num*SIG_R_PRICE as all_r_price , SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE profit_s , num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE) AS PROFIT , CASE WHEN SIG_PRICE>0 THEN (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)/SIG_PRICE *100 ELSE NULL END AS LRL -- 利润率 , SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE+ISNULL(SIG_OP_PRICE,0.0) AS DRLR -- 单人利润 , A.* , B.lock -- 价格锁定状态 FROM ENQ_PRICE A INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN B ON A.ENQ_ID = B.ENQ_ID WHERE B.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND B.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ) AS TEMP WHERE 1=1

Set.Sql: update enq_main set lock=1 where enq_id=@enq_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id; select lock from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id;

Set.Info: 锁定后报价不会再随修改行程和报价单变化，可人工设定报价，鼠标双击“黄色区域”
After the lock, the quote will not change with the modification of the itinerary and the quotation. You can manually set the quote and double-click the “Yellow Area”
解除锁定后，价格随修改行程自动变化
After the unlock, the price changes automatically with the modified itinerary
‘/’符号用来区分单价差价格（不含单间差/含单间差）
The '/' symbol is used to differentiate the price per unit difference (excluding single/single room difference)

Set.AddCss: #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-GRP_SER_SP_NUM, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-TOTAL, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-GRP_SER_SP_PRICE, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-GRP_SER_SP_NUM, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-GRP_SER_SP_TYPE { color: red } #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-GRP_SER_SP_NUM::before, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-TOTAL::before, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-GRP_SER_SP_PRICE::before, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT GRP_SER_SP_NUM::before { content: "(" } #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-GRP_SER_SP_NUM::after, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-TOTAL::after, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT .ewa-col-GRP_SER_SP_PRICE::after, #EWA_LF_@sys_frame_unid .CUT GRP_SER_SP_NUM::after { content: ")" }

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE' THEN '本次询价变更' ELSE '过往询价变更' END AS STA, CASE WHEN GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID IS NOT NULL AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID > 0 THEN '有/YES' ELSE '无/NO' END FIN, CASE WHEN GRP_FIN_TYPE IS NOT NULL AND GRP_FIN_TYPE > 0 THEN '有/YES' ELSE '无/NO' END PAY, CASE WHEN GRP_SER_SP_IMG IS NULL OR GRP_SER_SP_IMG = '' THEN NULL ELSE @EWA.CP + '/robert/v.jsp?tb=GRP_SER_SP&small=1&GRP_SER_SP_ID=' + convert(varchar, GRP_SER_SP_ID) + '&md5=' + IMG_MD5 END FILES, GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, A.*, GRP_SER_SP_NUM * GRP_SER_SP_PRICE AS TOTAL ,sm.SUP_NAME GRP_OTH_SUP_NAME ,goc.GRP_OTH_ID FROM GRP_SER_SP A INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN B ON A.ENQ_ID = B.ENQ_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID FROM GRP_FIN_TYPE WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'GRP_SER_SP' ) AS C ON C.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID = A.GRP_SER_SP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT GRP_FIN_TYPE FROM GRP_PAY_APPLY GROUP BY GRP_FIN_TYPE ) AS D ON C.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = D.GRP_FIN_TYPE left join GRP_OTH_COST goc on a.GRP_SER_SP_ID=goc.REF_ID AND goc.REF_TABLE='GRP_SER_SP' left join sup_main sm on goc.GRP_OTH_SUPID=sm.SUP_ID WHERE A.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID -- ewa_test @SUP_DOWN_ID is not null AND A.SUP_DOWN_ID = @SUP_DOWN_ID -- ewa_test @gssm_id is not null and a.gssm_id = @gssm_id -- ewa_test ) AS TEMP WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT '团已经关闭,不能进行操作' AS EWA_ERR_OUT from grp_main where grp_id=@grp_id and CLAC_STATUS IN('FINALLY_CLOSE','CLOSE') ; SELECT '变更单明细，不能删除' EWA_ERR_OUT FROM GRP_SER_SP WHERE GRP_SER_SP_ID = @GRP_SER_SP_ID AND GSSM_ID > 0 ; SELECT '已生成过支出计划,不能删除' EWA_ERR_OUT FROM GRP_FIN_TYPE WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='GRP_SER_SP' and GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID=@GRP_SER_SP_ID having count(1)>0 ; select '对应的其他应收申请已启动流程，请先打回其他应收流程后再删除。'+ '
其他应收申请ID：'+ convert(varchar,GRP_OTH_ID) EWA_ERR_OUT from GRP_OTH_COST WHERE REF_TABLE='GRP_SER_SP' and REF_ID=@GRP_SER_SP_ID AND GRP_OTH_STATUS !='FIN_OTH_NEW' ; INSERT INTO GRP_SER_SP_DEL_LOG( GRP_SER_SP_ID, GRP_ID, ENQ_ID, ENQ_JNY_ID, SER_TAG, GRP_SER_SP_NAME, GRP_SER_SP_PRICE , COIN_ID, GRP_SER_SP_REMARK, GRP_SER_SP_TYPE, GRP_SER_SP_NUM, SUP_ID, ADM_ID , CREATE_TIME, GRP_SER_SP_OB1, GRP_SER_SP_OB2, GRP_SER_SP_OB3, SUP_DOWN_ID , GRP_SER_SP_FROM, GRP_SER_SP_REFID, GRP_SER_SP_IMG, IMG_LEN, IMG_EXT , IMG_MD5, LAST_EML_ID, FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, FRO_TYPE, FRO_SUB_NUM , FRO_SER_KEY0, FRO_SER_KEY1, FRO_SER_KEY2, FRO_SER_CITY_ID, FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE , FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY, GSSM_ID, FRO_SER_CONN_ID, FRO_ENQ_OP_SUB_ID , DEL_DATE, DEL_ADM_ID ) SELECT GRP_SER_SP_ID, GRP_ID, ENQ_ID, ENQ_JNY_ID, SER_TAG, GRP_SER_SP_NAME, GRP_SER_SP_PRICE , COIN_ID, GRP_SER_SP_REMARK, GRP_SER_SP_TYPE, GRP_SER_SP_NUM, SUP_ID, ADM_ID , CREATE_TIME, GRP_SER_SP_OB1, GRP_SER_SP_OB2, GRP_SER_SP_OB3, SUP_DOWN_ID , GRP_SER_SP_FROM, GRP_SER_SP_REFID, GRP_SER_SP_IMG, IMG_LEN, IMG_EXT , IMG_MD5, LAST_EML_ID, FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, FRO_TYPE, FRO_SUB_NUM , FRO_SER_KEY0, FRO_SER_KEY1, FRO_SER_KEY2, FRO_SER_CITY_ID, FRO_ENQ_JNY_DATE , FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY, GSSM_ID, FRO_SER_CONN_ID, FRO_ENQ_OP_SUB_ID , @SYS_DATE, @G_ADM_ID from GRP_SER_SP WHERE GRP_SER_SP_ID = @GRP_SER_SP_ID and SUP_ID = @g_sup_id ; DELETE FROM GRP_SER_SP WHERE GRP_SER_SP_ID = @GRP_SER_SP_ID and SUP_ID = @g_sup_id ; UPDATE GRP_OTH_COST SET GRP_OTH_STATUS='DEL', GRP_ID=GRP_ID*-1 WHERE REF_TABLE='GRP_SER_SP' and REF_ID=@GRP_SER_SP_ID and SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND GRP_OTH_STATUS='FIN_OTH_NEW' and not exists(select 1 from GRP_SER_SP WHERE GRP_SER_SP_ID = @GRP_SER_SP_ID);

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.* , A.SUB_NUM * A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE as TOTAL , K0.SER_KEY_NAME+' '+ISNULL(K1.SER_KEY_NAME,'') SER_DES , JNY.ENQ_JNY_DATE , JNY.ENQ_JNY_DAY , JNY.WAY_CODE , CT.CITY_NAME , CT.CITY_NAME_EN FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY JNY ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = JNY.ENQ_JNY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K0 ON A.SER_KEY0=K0.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K1 ON A.SER_KEY1=K1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN CITY CT ON A.SER_CITY_ID = CT.CITY_ID inner join enq_main em on jny.ENQ_ID=em.ENQ_ID and em.ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND JNY.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID and em.GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND NOT EXISTS( select 1 from ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB s inner join ENQ_OP_MAIN sm on s.ENQ_OP_ID=sm.ENQ_OP_ID where jny.ENQ_JNY_DAY = s.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY -- 按照天的顺序一致 AND A.SER_CITY_ID = s.SER_CITY_ID -- 服务所在城市一致 AND A.SER_ID = s.SER_ID -- 服务一致 AND a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX = s.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX -- 服务顺序一致 AND s.FRO_GRP_ID = em.GRP_ID --团号一致 AND (s.SUB_NUM is null or s.SUB_NUM>0) AND (sm.SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE' OR sm.ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID) ) order by JNY.ENQ_JNY_DAY, a.SER_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT HEAD_NUM + PEOPLE_NUM AS NUMS, a.*, b.*, D.GRP_HY_CODE , CASE WHEN CC.ej IS NULL THEN 'NO' ELSE 'YES' END AS enqday , CASE WHEN FS.CURRENCY_ID IS NULL THEN '未上传' ELSE '下载' END AS FILES , SNA.SNA_ID /* 快照 */ ,sup.SUP_NAME AGENT_SUP_NAME ,SUP.SUP_UNID AGENT_SUP_UNID ,SUP.SUP_ID AGENT_SUP_ID ,gm.GRP_UNID ,gm.GRP_NAME , ep.SIG_R_PRICE DJ_PRICE FROM ENQ_MAIN a INNER JOIN grp_main gm ON a.grp_id = gm.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID AS ENQ_ID1 , sum(num*sig_r_price) as TOTAL_PRICE, sum(num*SIG_PRICE) as TOTAL_COST, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE - SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 FROM ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b ON a.enq_id = b.enq_id1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID AS ENQID, COUNT(enq_id) AS ej FROM enq_jny GROUP BY enq_id ) CC ON a.enq_id = CC.ENQID LEFT JOIN GRP_MAIN D ON A.GRP_ID = D.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN SUP ON D.SUP_DOWN_ID = SUP.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.REF_ID,a.CURRENCY_ID FROM CURRENCY_FILE a inner join enq_main b on a.REF_ID = b.ENQ_ID WHERE a.REF_TYPE='ENQ' AND a.FILE_TYPE='REQUIRE' AND a.CURRENCY_OB1='AUTO' and (b.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID or b.ENQ_ID = @R_ID) ) FS ON A.ENQ_ID = FS.REF_ID LEFT JOIN SNA_MAIN SNA ON A.ENQ_ID = SNA.ENQ_ID AND A.GRP_ID = SNA.GRP_ID AND SNA.SNA_TYPE = 'SNAP_ENQ' LEFT JOIN ENQ_PRICE ep on a.ENQ_ID=ep.ENQ_ID and ep.ENQ_ENTRY='SER_ENTRY1' WHERE ((@R_ID IS NULL AND a.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID) OR a.ENQ_ID = @R_ID) AND enq_state <> 'DEL' AND (a.adm_id = @g_adm_id OR gm.adm_id = @g_adm_id OR (@dep = 1 AND (a.adm_id IN ( SELECT adm_id FROM adm_user WHERE adm_dep_id = @g_dep_id ) OR A.adm_id IN (@G_SUB_IDS_SPLIT)))) AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND (A.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID OR @ENQ_ID IS NULL OR @allenqs = '1') ORDER BY isnull(enq_default,'COM_NO') desc,ENQ_ID DESC

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL1
Set.Sql: SELECT HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM AS NUMS, a.*,b.*,CASE WHEN CC.ej IS NULL THEN 'NO' else 'YES' end as enqday, CASE WHEN FS.CURRENCY_ID IS NULL THEN '未上传' ELSE '下载' END AS FILES ,d.GRP_HY_CODE ,sup.SUP_NAME AGENT_SUP_NAME ,SUP.SUP_UNID AGENT_SUP_UNID ,SUP.SUP_ID AGENT_SUP_ID ,d.GRP_UNID ,d.GRP_NAME , ep.SIG_R_PRICE DJ_PRICE FROM ENQ_MAIN a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ENQ_ID AS ENQ_ID1 , sum(num*sig_r_price) as TOTAL_PRICE, sum(num*SIG_PRICE) as TOTAL_COST, sum(num * (SIG_R_PRICE - SIG_PRICE)) AS PROFIT1 FROM ENQ_PRICE GROUP BY ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id1 LEFT JOIN (select ENQ_ID as ENQID,COUNT(enq_id) ej from enq_jny group by enq_id) CC ON a.enq_id=CC.ENQID LEFT JOIN (SELECT a.REF_ID,a.CURRENCY_ID FROM CURRENCY_FILE a inner join enq_main b on a.REF_ID = b.ENQ_ID WHERE a.REF_TYPE='ENQ' AND a.FILE_TYPE='REQUIRE' AND a.CURRENCY_OB1='AUTO' and (b.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID or b.ENQ_ID = @R_ID))AS FS ON A.ENQ_ID=FS.REF_ID LEFT JOIN GRP_MAIN D ON A.GRP_ID=D.GRP_ID LEFT JOIN SUP_MAIN SUP ON D.SUP_DOWN_ID=SUP.SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ENQ_PRICE ep on a.ENQ_ID=ep.ENQ_ID and ep.ENQ_ENTRY='SER_ENTRY1' WHERE ( ((@RID IS NULL OR @RTAG='GRP_PAY_APPLY') AND a.GRP_ID=@GRP_ID ) OR (a.ENQ_ID = @RID AND @RTAG<>'GRP_PAY_APPLY') ) and enq_state<>'DEL' AND A.SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND (A.ENQ_ID=@ENQ_ID OR @ENQ_ID IS NULL or @allenqs = '1') order by isnull(enq_default,'COM_NO') desc, enq_id desc

subover
