Set.Top: <script src="/pf/js/box.js"></script>

Set.Type: 预算价格和供应商价格

Set.CallName: 预算价格和供应商价格
获取有支出计划且未下单采购单

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: with w_invoices as ( select count(1) INVOICES,FILE_RID from sys_atts where file_from='ENQ_OP_MAIN-INVOICE' and file_status='COM_YES' group by FILE_RID ), w_budget as ( SELECT k.enq_op_id OPID, B.COIN_NAME, B.COIN_ID, sum(s.enq_jny_price* s.SUB_NUM) BASE_PRICE, sum(k.enq_jny_price_sup * (k.SUB_NUM - ISNULL(k.eoms_free, 0)) ) AS SUP_PRICE -- eoms_free 免额 FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB K INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN K2 ON K.ENQ_OP_ID=K2.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN K3 ON K2.ENQ_ID=K3.ENQ_ID inner join V_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB s on s.ENQ_JNY_DAY=K.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY and s.SER_CITY_ID=K.SER_CITY_ID and s.SER_ID=k.SER_ID and K.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX=s.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX and k.FRO_GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID and K3.ENQ_ID=s.ENQ_ID INNER JOIN ( select COIN_ID,CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' then COIN_KEY ELSE COIN_NAME END COIN_NAME,COIN_KEY from SYS_COIN ) B ON K.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID WHERE K.sup_id = @G_SUP_ID and K.fro_grp_id = @GRP_ID and isnull(k.SUB_NUM,1)!=0 GROUP BY K.enq_op_id, B.COIN_ID, B.COIN_NAME ), w_DIFF as ( --询价和预算全部折算成rmb后的差额 SELECT OPID,BASE_PRICE , SUP_PRICE , SUP_PRICE -BASE_PRICE DIFF_PRICE , A.COIN_ID FROM ( SELECT K.enq_op_id OPID,K.COIN_ID,s.COIN_ID COIN_ID_JNY ,K.SUP_DOWN_ID, DBO.f_getpricebycoin(K3.GRP_ID,s.COIN_ID,1,sum(s.enq_jny_price * s.SUB_NUM)) BASE_PRICE, -- 使用询价单中的价格 DBO.f_getpricebycoin(K3.GRP_ID,k.COIN_ID,1,sum(k.enq_jny_price_SUP * (isnull(k.SUB_NUM,s.SUB_NUM) - isnull(k.eoms_free, 0) ))) AS SUP_PRICE FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB K INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN K2 ON K.ENQ_OP_ID=K2.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN K3 ON K2.ENQ_ID=K3.ENQ_ID inner join V_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB s on s.ENQ_JNY_DAY=K.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY and s.SER_CITY_ID=K.SER_CITY_ID and s.SER_ID=k.SER_ID and K.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX=s.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX and k.FRO_GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID and K3.ENQ_ID=s.ENQ_ID WHERE K3.GRP_ID=@GRP_ID and isnull(k.SUB_NUM,1)!=0 GROUP BY K.enq_op_id, K.SUP_DOWN_ID,K.COIN_ID,s.COIN_ID,K3.GRP_ID ) A ), w_grp_peoples as( SELECT count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id AS grpId FROM grp_costumer g WHERE COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' and grp_id = @grp_id GROUP BY g.grp_id ), w_sup_contracts as ( -- 供应商合同 SELECT B_SUP_ID,SUP_CON_ID, CASE WHEN SUP_CON_IMG IS NULL OR SUP_CON_IMG ='' THEN NULL ELSE '1' END AS SUP_CON_FILES FROM SUP_CONTRACT WHERE A_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND SUP_CON_STATE='USED' AND SUP_CON_DEFAULT='COM_YES' ), order_sub as ( select a.*, changes.* from V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A left join( select a.fro_enq_op_sub_id, coin_id order_change_coin , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_NUM) as order_change_num from GRP_SER_SP a WHERE a.GRP_SER_SP_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' group by fro_enq_op_sub_id, coin_id ) changes on changes.fro_enq_op_sub_id = a.enq_op_sub_id WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ), SER_SUB as ( -- 此订单的所有日程和服务的清单，包含新增的服务 SELECT a.*, changes.*, ord_detail.enq_op_id as id0,ord_detail1.enq_op_id as id1 from V_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a inner join ( select distinct enq_op_id, enq_jny_day, GRP_ID from V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) ord_detail on a.enq_jny_day = ord_detail.enq_jny_day and a.GRP_ID = ord_detail.GRP_ID inner join ( select distinct enq_op_id, SER_ID, GRP_ID from V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) ord_detail1 on a.SER_ID = ord_detail1.SER_ID and a.GRP_ID = ord_detail1.GRP_ID and ord_detail.enq_op_id = ord_detail1.enq_op_id left join ( select a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, coin_id ser_change_coin , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_NUM) as ser_change_num from GRP_SER_SP a WHERE a.GRP_SER_SP_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' and GRP_ID = @GRP_ID group by FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, coin_id ) changes on a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = changes.FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID WHERE a.ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE' -- 当前选中的询价单 and a.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ), order_ser_diff as ( select enq_op_id_all, count(*) as changes from( SELECT ser_sub.enq_jny_date as sub_enq_jny_date , isnull(a.enq_op_id, SER_SUB.id0) enq_op_id_all , a.enq_op_id, SER_SUB.id0 , case -- 新增，订单中没有 when a.enq_op_id is null then SER_SUB.sub_num - isnull(ser_change_num,0) -- 删除，询价单没有 when id0 is null then a.SUB_NUM + isnull(order_change_num,0) -- 修改，日期不同 when a.ENQ_JNY_Date != SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_Date then 1 -- 修改而且日期相同 else SER_SUB.SUB_NUM - (a.SUB_NUM + isnull(order_change_num,0)) end as ch FROM order_sub a left JOIN SER_SUB ON -- 当前有效的询价单 SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_DAY = a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY -- 按照天的顺序链接 AND A.SER_CITY_ID = SER_SUB.SER_CITY_ID AND A.SER_ID = SER_SUB.SER_ID AND A.FRO_GRP_ID = SER_SUB.GRP_ID and a.enq_op_id = ser_sub.id0 and A.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX = SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX ) a WHERE ch !=0 group by enq_op_id_all ), w_sps as ( select gss.SUP_DOWN_ID,sm.SER_ID,gft.COIN_ID,sum(gft.COS_PRICE) SP_PRICE,sum(gf.ACCOUNT) SP_PAID from GRP_SER_SP gss inner join SER_MAIN sm on gss.SER_TAG = sm.SER_TAG and sm.SUP_ID = 3 left join GRP_FIN_TYPE gft on gft.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'GRP_SER_SP' AND gft.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID = gss.GRP_SER_SP_ID left join GRP_FINANCE gf on gft.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID= gf.GRP_FIN_TYPE and gf.pay_status='PAY_YES' and gf.fin_types='FIN_PAY' where gss.grp_id=@grp_id and gss.GSSM_ID is null group by gss.SUP_DOWN_ID,gft.COIN_ID,sm.SER_ID ), w_has_sp as ( -- 有相同服务的变更单的采购单 select eom.SUP_ID ,em.GRP_ID , eom.ENQ_OP_ID EOID, w.COIN_ID,max(w.SP_PRICE) SP_PRICE, max(SP_PAID) SP_PAID from ENQ_OP_MAIN eom inner join ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB eoms on eom.ENQ_OP_ID = eoms.ENQ_OP_ID inner join enq_main em on eom.ENQ_ID = em.ENQ_ID inner join w_sps w on eom.sup_id=w.SUP_DOWN_ID and eoms.ser_id=w.SER_ID where em.grp_id=@grp_id group by eom.SUP_ID ,em.GRP_ID , eom.ENQ_OP_ID, w.COIN_ID ), W_FilteredData AS ( SELECT A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, A.COS_PRICE, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM FROM grp_fin_type A WHERE A.grp_id = @grp_id AND A.fin_type = '0' AND (A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' ) AND A.sup_id = @G_SUP_ID ), W_OP_PLAN AS ( SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM W_FilteredData WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_OP_PAY AS ( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, SUM(ISNULL(gf.ACCOUNT, 0)) AS PAY_REAL FROM W_FilteredData A LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE AND B.APPLY_SUP_ID = A.SUP_ID AND B.APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' left join GRP_FINANCE gf on A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID=gf.GRP_FIN_TYPE and B.APPLY_ID=gf.APPLY_ID and gf.pay_status='PAY_YES' and gf.fin_types='FIN_PAY' WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' GROUP BY A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_OP AS( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, a.PAY_PLAN,b.PAY_REAL FROM W_OP_PLAN A INNER JOIN W_OP_PAY B ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.RELATE_SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID AND A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID=B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ) SELECT a.* , sp.SP_PRICE , sp.SP_PAID , wop.PAY_REAL payment , isnull(wop.PAY_PLAN,0)+isnull(sp.SP_PRICE,0)-isnull(wop.PAY_REAL,0)-isnull(sp.SP_PAID,0) unpay , gg.grp_id , gg.GRP_HY_CODE , gg.GRP_SDATE , b.bas_tag_html+CASE WHEN CONFIRM_NO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE +' NO:'+ CONFIRM_NO END bas_tag_html , dbo.f_ser_idToname(ser_ids) AS ser_names , CASE WHEN ((ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE') or (ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' and gg.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW')) AND @EWA_LANG<>'enus' THEN '正常状态' WHEN ((ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE') or (ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' and gg.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW')) AND @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN 'normal status' WHEN @EWA_LANG<>'enus' THEN '作废（重新询价）' ELSE 'Obsolete (re-quote)' END AS ST , HEAD_NUM , PEOPLE_NUM , isnull(d.nums,0 )AS nums , CASE WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 THEN '一致' WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 THEN'少人' WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 THEN'多人' END AS isok , e.SUP_NAME , dd.* , CASE WHEN PIC_PHY_PATH IS NULL OR PIC_PHY_PATH='' THEN NULL ELSE '1' END PURCHASE_CONTRACTS -- 采购合同 , DBO.F_ENQ_OP_ISCAN_DEL(A.ENQ_OP_ID) AS DELE , DBO.F_PART_JNY_SEND(A.ENQ_OP_ID) AS PJSTA , CASE WHEN STP.BAS_TAG='SUP_GRD_ORD' THEN '现金支出' ELSE STP.BAS_TAG_NAME END AS STPP , E.SUP_PID , SC.* , CASE WHEN 'enus' = @EWA_LANG then CASE WHEN DIFF_PRICE>0 THEN 'Over' WHEN DIFF_PRICE=0 THEN 'Equal' WHEN DIFF_PRICE<0 THEN 'Low' END ELSE CASE WHEN DIFF_PRICE>0 THEN '超出预算' WHEN DIFF_PRICE=0 THEN '等于预算' WHEN DIFF_PRICE<0 THEN '低于预算' END END as DIFF_YS , INVOICES.INVOICES , order_ser_diff.changes -- 服务差异（包括，删除，新增，修改，日期改变） FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a INNER JOIN bas_tag b ON a.state=b.bas_tag INNER JOIN enq_main c ON a.enq_id=c.enq_id INNER JOIN grp_main gg ON c.grp_id=gg.grp_id left join order_ser_diff on order_ser_diff.enq_op_id_all = a.enq_op_id left JOIN ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and (sd_data = @sup_id) ) SHARE_DATA on gg.grp_id = SHARE_DATA.sd_ref_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BAS_TAG, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN ISNULL(BAS_TAG_NAME_EN,BAS_TAG_NAME)ELSE BAS_TAG_NAME END BAS_TAG_NAME FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='SUP_OP_TP' ) STP ON A.SUP_TYPE=STP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN w_grp_peoples AS d ON d.grpId=gg.grp_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN ISNULL(SUP_NAME_EN,SUP_NAME) ELSE SUP_NAME END SUP_NAME ,SUP_ID,SUP_PID FROM sup_main ) e ON a.sup_id=e.sup_id LEFT JOIN w_budget dd ON A.ENQ_OP_ID=dd.OPID -- 供应商合同数量 LEFT JOIN w_sup_contracts SC ON A.SUP_ID =SC.B_SUP_ID --询价和预算全部折算成rmb后的差额 LEFT JOIN w_DIFF as diff ON A.ENQ_OP_ID=DIFF.OPID and Dd.COIN_ID=DIFF.COIN_ID --20230808 JZP 增加上传供应商账单 left join w_invoices as INVOICES on INVOICES.FILE_RID=a.ENQ_OP_ID left join W_OP wop on wop.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID = a.ENQ_OP_ID and wop.COIN_ID = isnull(dd.COIN_ID,wop.COIN_ID) left join w_has_sp sp on a.ENQ_OP_ID=sp.EOID and sp.COIN_ID = isnull(dd.COIN_ID,sp.COIN_ID) WHERE OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- ewa_test @RID IS not NULL AND a.ENQ_OP_ID=@RID -- ewa_test @sup_id is not NULL and sd_ref_id>0 and a.FLOW_STATE!='FLOW_OP' -- ewa_test @BAT = '1' AND (A.ENQ_ORD_ID=@ENQ_ORD_ID OR GRP_DAY_BUS_ORD_ID=@ORD_ID) -- ewa_test @ewa_recycle is null AND (A.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED') -- ewa_test @ewa_recycle is not null AND (A.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'DEL') -- ewa_test @grp_id is not null AND gg.grp_id = @grp_id -- ewa_test @SELECT_STATE is not null AND ISNULL(a.SELECT_STATE, 'CHECKED_FALSE') = @SELECT_STATE -- ewa_test ORDER BY enq_op_id DESC

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: PR_ENQ_OP_PACT (@ENQ_ID,@enq_OP_id, @EWA_WF_NEXT)

Set.Name: NEW_MENU_2019 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT gg.grp_id, gg.GRP_SDATE, b.bas_tag_html+CASE WHEN CONFIRM_NO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE +' NO:'+ CONFIRM_NO END bas_tag_html, dbo.f_ser_idToname(ser_ids) AS ser_names, CASE WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE' AND @EWA_LANG<>'enus' THEN '正常状态' WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE' AND @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN 'normal status' WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE <>'CHECKED_TRUE' AND @EWA_LANG<>'enus' THEN '作废（重新询价）' ELSE 'Obsolete (re-quote)' END AS ST, HEAD_NUM, PEOPLE_NUM, isnull(d.nums,0)AS nums, CASE WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 THEN '一致' WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 THEN'少人' WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 THEN'多人' END AS isok , a.*, e.SUP_NAME, GRP_HY_CODE, dd.*, CASE WHEN PIC_PHY_PATH IS NULL OR PIC_PHY_PATH='' THEN '' ELSE '合同' END a ,DBO.F_ENQ_OP_ISCAN_DEL(A.ENQ_OP_ID)AS DELE ,DBO.F_PART_JNY_SEND(A.ENQ_OP_ID) AS PJSTA ,CASE WHEN STP.BAS_TAG='SUP_GRD_ORD' THEN '现金支出' ELSE STP.BAS_TAG_NAME END AS STPP,E.SUP_PID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a INNER JOIN bas_tag b ON a.state=b.bas_tag INNER JOIN enq_main c ON a.enq_id=c.enq_id AND C.ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE' INNER JOIN grp_main gg ON c.grp_id=gg.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BAS_TAG,CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN ISNULL(BAS_TAG_NAME_EN,BAS_TAG_NAME)ELSE BAS_TAG_NAME END BAS_TAG_NAME FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='SUP_OP_TP')STP ON A.SUP_TYPE=STP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id AS grpId FROM grp_costumer g WHERE COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY g.grp_id ) AS d ON d.grpId=gg.grp_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN ISNULL(SUP_NAME_EN,SUP_NAME) ELSE SUP_NAME END SUP_NAME ,SUP_ID,SUP_PID FROM sup_main ) e ON a.sup_id=e.sup_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT enq_op_id OPID, COIN_NAME, sum(enq_jny_price* SUB_NUM) BASE_PRICE, sum(enq_jny_price_op * SUB_NUM)AS OP_PRICE, sum(enq_jny_price_sup* SUB_NUM) AS SUP_PRICE FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ( select COIN_ID,CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' then COIN_KEY ELSE COIN_NAME END COIN_NAME,COIN_KEY from SYS_COIN ) B ON A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID WHERE sup_id=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY enq_op_id, COIN_NAME ) Dd ON A.ENQ_OP_ID=Dd.OPID WHERE OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND (A.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED') AND gg.GRP_SDATE between @DT_START AND @DT_END ORDER BY gg.GRP_SDATE desc, enq_op_id DESC

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO SYS_STATUS( SYS_STA_RID, SYS_STA_TABLE, SYS_STA_TAG, SYS_STA_VAL, SYS_STA_CDATE, SYS_STA_MEMO, SUP_ID, ADM_ID)VALUES( @ENQ_OP_ID, 'ENQ_OP_MAIN', @EWA_WF_NAME, @EWA_WF_NEXT, @SYS_DATE, @EWA_WF_UMSG, @G_SUP_ID, @G_ADM_ID);

Set.Name: 选中询价单
生成支出计划
Set.Sql:
DELETE FROM GRP_FIN_TYPE WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND FIN_TYPE = '0' AND RELATE_SUP_ID = @SUP_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='ENQ_OP_MAIN' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID=@ENQ_OP_ID;
INSERT INTO GRP_FIN_TYPE( GRP_ID, ENQ_ID, SUP_ID, FIN_TYPE_NAME, COS_PRICE, FIN_TYPE, FIN_TYPE_GROUP , RELATE_SUP_ID, TYPE_MEMO, COIN_ID, FLAGS, SALES_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_CDATE , GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, UNID ) SELECT @GRP_ID, @ENQ_ID, @G_SUP_ID, '供应商支付计划', pp, 0, 'FINTYP_IN' , @SUP_ID, '向供应商支付服务费：'+sup_name, coin_id, @FLAGS, @G_ADM_ID, GETDATE() , 'ENQ_OP_MAIN', @ENQ_OP_ID, NEWID() FROM ( select -1 AS FF,999999 AS SS ,'总价' AS DD , @SUP_ID AS GG , cast(sum(isnull(isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,enq_jny_price)*sub_num ,0.0)) as varchar)+'/'+COIN_KEY as sup_name , a.coin_id,sum(isnull(isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,enq_jny_price)*sub_num ,0.0)) pp from ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB a inner join sys_coin b on a.coin_id=b.coin_id where a.enq_jny_id in ( select col from dbo.f_split(@ENQ_JNY_IDS,',') ) and a.sup_down_id=@SUP_ID and a.enq_op_id = @enq_op_id group by a.coin_id, b.COIN_KEY ) AS TEMP

Set.Name: 生成支出计划2
Set.Sql:
DELETE FROM GRP_FIN_TYPE WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND FIN_TYPE= '0' AND RELATE_SUP_ID=@SUP_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='GRP_SER_SP' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID IS NOT NULL ; INSERT INTO GRP_FIN_TYPE( GRP_ID, ENQ_ID, SUP_ID, FIN_TYPE_NAME, COS_PRICE, FIN_TYPE, FIN_TYPE_GROUP , RELATE_SUP_ID, TYPE_MEMO , COIN_ID, FLAGS, SALES_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_CDATE , GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, UNID )
SELECT @GRP_ID, @ENQ_ID, @G_SUP_ID,'供应商变更服务支付计划', sub_price, 0, 'FINTYP_IN' , @SUP_ID, '向供应商支付变更服务费：'+cast(sub_price as varchar)+'/'+coin_key , coin_id, @FLAGS, @G_ADM_ID, GETDATE() , 'GRP_SER_SP', GRP_SER_SP_ID, NEWID() FROM ( SELECT case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE ='cut' then isnull((GRP_SER_SP_NUM*GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*(-1)) ,0.0) when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE ='add' then isnull((GRP_SER_SP_NUM*GRP_SER_SP_PRICE) ,0.0) else 0.0 end as sub_price , b.coin_key , a.* FROM GRP_SER_SP a inner join sys_coin b on a.coin_id=b.coin_id WHERE GRP_ID = @grp_id and sup_down_id = @SUP_ID and gssm_id is null -- 变更单会覆盖供应商的服务价格，因此不用重复支出 ) as temp

Set.Name: 审批获得grp_id
Set.Sql: select grp_id from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id

Set.Name: setenqid
生成支出计划PR
生成支出计划2PR
backto
选中询价单(地接单)
Set.Sql: UPDATE ENQ_OP_MAIN SET SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' WHERE ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID;

Set.Name: reset_part
Set.Sql: PR_RESET_PART_JNY_BY_ENQ_UPDATE(@enq_op_id)

Set.Name: CHECK_ERR
Set.Sql:
select '询价单已作废，不能下单。请先尝试[重置]操作，如果重置失败请重做采购单。' EWA_ERR_OUT from ENQ_OP_Main a inner join enq_main b on a.ENQ_ID = b.ENQ_ID where ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID and b.ENQ_SELECT_STATE != 'CHECKED_TRUE' ;
SELECT DBO.[f_stradd_ENQ_OP_SUB_REPEAT](@GRP_ID,@ENQ_ID,@ENQ_OP_ID,@SUP_ID) EWA_ERR_OUT FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN WHERE ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID and ISNULL(SELECT_STATE,'')!='CHECKED_TRUE'

Set.Name: payments
Set.Sql: WITH W_FilteredData AS ( SELECT A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, A.COS_PRICE, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM FROM grp_fin_type A WHERE A.grp_id = @GRP_ID AND A.fin_type = '0' AND (A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' or GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM='GRP_SER_SP') AND A.sup_id = @G_SUP_ID ), W_OP_PLAN AS ( SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM W_FilteredData WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_OP_PAY AS ( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, SUM(ISNULL(ACCOUNT, 0)) AS PAY_REAL FROM W_FilteredData A LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE AND B.APPLY_SUP_ID = A.SUP_ID AND B.APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' GROUP BY A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_OP AS( SELECT A.*,B.PAY_REAL FROM W_OP_PLAN A INNER JOIN W_OP_PAY B ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.RELATE_SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID AND A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID=B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_SP_PLAN AS ( SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS SP_PAY_PLAN FROM W_FilteredData WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'GRP_SER_SP' GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID ), W_SP_PAY AS ( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(ISNULL(ACCOUNT, 0)) AS SP_PAY_REAL FROM W_FilteredData A LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE AND B.APPLY_SUP_ID = A.SUP_ID AND B.APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'GRP_SER_SP' GROUP BY A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ), W_SP AS( SELECT A.*,B.SP_PAY_REAL FROM W_SP_PLAN A INNER JOIN W_SP_PAY B ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.RELATE_SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID ) SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ,isnull(A.PAY_PLAN,0) PAY_PLAN,isnull(A.PAY_REAL,0) PAY_REAL ,isnull(B.SP_PAY_PLAN,0) SP_PAY_PLAN,isnull(B.SP_PAY_REAL,0) SP_PAY_REAL ,C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM W_OP A LEFT JOIN W_SP B ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.RELATE_SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON A.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID WHERE 1=1

Set.Name: 变更服务单SQL
Set.Sql:
select a.*, b.COIN_NAME, b.COIN_KEY from ( select GRP_ID , SUP_DOWN_ID , COIN_ID , SUM(CASE WHEN GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' THEN GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*GRP_SER_SP_NUM ELSE GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*GRP_SER_SP_NUM * -1 END) GRP_SER_SP_PRICE from GRP_SER_SP where GRP_ID = @GRP_ID AND GSSM_ID is null and sup_id = @g_sup_id group by GRP_ID, SUP_DOWN_ID, COIN_ID ) a left join sys_coin b on a.COIN_ID = b.COIN_ID where 1=1 order by a.SUP_DOWN_ID,a.COIN_ID;
SELECT G.SUP_ID,G.COIN_ID ,G.SP_PAY_PLAN,G.SP_PAY_REAL,C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM ( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(A.COS_PRICE) AS SP_PAY_PLAN ,SUM(isnull(ACCOUNT,0)) AS SP_PAY_REAL FROM grp_fin_type A LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE AND B.APPLY_SUP_ID = a.SUP_ID AND B.APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' where A.grp_id=@grp_id and A.fin_type='0' AND A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM='GRP_SER_SP' and A.sup_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ) G LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON G.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID WHERE 1=1 order by G.SUP_ID,G.COIN_ID

Set.Name: 预算价格和供应商价格
Set.Sql: SELECT BASE_PRICE,SUP_PRICE+ISNULL(SP_PRICE,0) SUP_PRICE FROM ( SELECT enq_op_id OPID,COIN_ID,SUP_DOWN_ID, DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,COIN_ID,1,sum(enq_jny_price* SUB_NUM)) BASE_PRICE, DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,COIN_ID,1,sum(enq_jny_price_SUP* SUB_NUM)) AS SUP_PRICE FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID GROUP BY enq_op_id, SUP_DOWN_ID,COIN_ID ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUP_DOWN_ID,SUM(PRICE) SP_PRICE FROM ( SELECT *, CASE WHEN GRP_SER_SP_TYPE ='CUT' THEN DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,COIN_ID,1,GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*GRP_SER_SP_NUM)*-1 ELSE DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,COIN_ID,1,GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*GRP_SER_SP_NUM) END PRICE FROM GRP_SER_SP WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID )TEMP GROUP BY SUP_DOWN_ID )B ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=B.SUP_DOWN_ID

Set.Name: 取消选中询价单
获取有支出计划且未下单采购单
Set.Sql:
SELECT DBO.[f_stradd_ENQ_OP_SUB_REPEAT](@GRP_ID,@ENQ_ID,@ENQ_OP_ID,@SUP_ID) DUP_SER FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN WHERE ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID and ISNULL(SELECT_STATE,'')!='CHECKED_TRUE' ;
SELECT * from ( SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID OLD_ENQ_OP_ID,dbo.f_ser_idToname(a.ser_ids) AS SER_NAMES, k.ENQ_OP_ID HAS_SAME_SER FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a inner join enq_main b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join ENQ_OP_MAIN k on a.ENQ_OP_ID=k.ENQ_OP_ID and exists( SELECT 1 FROM V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB XA INNER JOIN V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB XB ON XA.ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID AND XB.ENQ_OP_ID =k.ENQ_OP_ID AND XA.ENQ_JNY_DAY=XB.ENQ_JNY_DAY AND XA.SER_ID=XB.SER_ID AND XA.SER_CONN_ID=XB.SER_CONN_ID AND ISNULL(XA.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,0)>0 AND ISNULL(XB.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,0)>0 AND XB.SUB_NUM>0 INNER JOIN SER_MAIN XC ON XA.SER_ID=XC.SER_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN XD ON XB.SUP_DOWN_ID=XD.SUP_ID ) where exists(select 1 from GRP_FIN_TYPE x where a.ENQ_OP_ID = x.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID and x.FIN_TYPE=0 and x.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='ENQ_OP_MAIN' and x.grp_id=@grp_id and x.RELATE_SUP_ID=@SUP_ID ) and not exists(select 1 from GRP_FIN_TYPE x where x.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID = @ENQ_OP_ID and x.FIN_TYPE=0 and x.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='ENQ_OP_MAIN' and x.grp_id=@grp_id and x.RELATE_SUP_ID=@SUP_ID ) and isnull(a.SELECT_STATE,'')!='CHECKED_TRUE' AND ISNULL(a.SUP_TYPE,'')!='SUP_GRD_ORD' AND a.SUP_ID=@SUP_ID and b.grp_id=@grp_id ) x where 1=1;

Set.Name: aa
Set.Script: alert('日程或者服务数量已经发生改变请重新创建询价单！');

Set.Info: The change order has been paid

Set.RefSql: select bas_tag,bas_tag_name,bas_tag_name_EN from bas_tag where BAS_TAG_GRP='STATE'

Set.SearchSql: SELECT WF_UNIT_ID, WF_UNIT_NAME, WF_UNIT_NAME_EN FROM _EWA_WF_UNIT WHERE WF_ID='ENQ_OP_MAIN' AND WF_REF_ID=@G_SUP_UNID

Set.RefSql: SELECT WF_UNIT_ID, WF_UNIT_NAME, WF_UNIT_NAME_EN FROM _EWA_WF_UNIT WHERE WF_ID='ENQ_OP_MAIN' AND WF_REF_ID=@G_SUP_UNID
SELECT ADM_ID,ADM_NAME,ADM_NAME_EN FROM ADM_USER WHERE SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID ORDER BY ADM_NAME

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.*, -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is not null mysers.SER_PRICE AS BAS_PRICE, -- 维护的采购单价 mysers.SER_PRICE * A.SUB_NUM AS BAS_TOTAL, -- ewa_test A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE, A.SUB_NUM * A.ENQ_JNY_PRICE AS TOTAL, K0.SER_KEY_NAME + ' ' + ISNULL(K1.SER_KEY_NAME, '') SER_DES, JNY.ENQ_JNY_DATE, JNY.ENQ_JNY_DAY, JNY.WAY_CODE, CT.CITY_NAME, CT.CITY_NAME_EN FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN ENQ_JNY JNY ON A.ENQ_JNY_ID = JNY.ENQ_JNY_ID -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is not null inner join ser_conn sc on a.SER_CONN_ID = sc.SER_CONN_ID INNER JOIN enq_op_main_sub mm ON mm.enq_op_id = @up_enq_op_id AND a.ser_id = mm.ser_id AND a.SER_CITY_ID = mm.SER_CITY_ID AND a.SER_KEY0 = mm.SER_KEY0 AND a.SER_KEY1 = mm.SER_KEY1 AND a.SER_KEY2 = mm.SER_KEY2 AND a.ENQ_JNY_ID = mm.ENQ_JNY_ID INNER JOIN enq_op_main m ON m.enq_op_id = mm.enq_op_id AND m.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID LEFT JOIN ser_conn mysers ON mysers.ser_conn_id = sc.ref_ser_conn_id -- ewa_test LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K0 ON A.SER_KEY0 = K0.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY K1 ON A.SER_KEY1 = K1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN CITY CT ON A.SER_CITY_ID = CT.CITY_ID WHERE 1 = 1 -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is null AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- ewa_test AND JNY.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND A.SER_ID IN (@SER_IDS_split) AND A.ENQ_JNY_ID IN (@ENQ_JNY_IDS_split) ORDER BY JNY.ENQ_JNY_DAY, a.SER_ID

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT A.*, c.city_cou_name AS departure_city, d.city_cou_name AS arrival_city, b.COIN_ID, TAG0, TAG1, TAG2, TAG3, TAG4, TAG5, TAG6, TAG7, TAG8, TAG9, TAG10, TAG11 FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB_FLIGHT A INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN EOM ON A.ENQ_OP_ID = EOM.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN enq_jny_ser_sub b ON a.EA_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID INNER JOIN ser_key sc ON b.ser_key0 = sc.ser_key_id LEFT JOIN v_city c ON a.A_D_CITY_ID = c.city_id LEFT JOIN v_city d ON a.A_A_CITY_ID = d.city_id WHERE ( EOM.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID OR EOM.OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ) AND EOM.ENQ_OP_ID = @ENQ_OP_ID -- ewa_test @EWA_RECYCLE is null AND A.A_STATUS = 'USED' -- ewa_test @EWA_RECYCLE = '1' AND A.A_STATUS = 'DEL' -- ewa_test ORDER BY A.EA_ENQ_JNY_DATE

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
-- EWA_SQL_SPLIT_NO SELECT am.MNU_TAG SHOW_OVERSEAS_PROFIT from ADM_MENU am inner join ADM_ACL_MNU aam on am.MNU_ID = aam.MNU_ID where am.MNU_TAG='SHOW_OVERSEAS_PROFIT' and aam.ADM_ID = @G_ADM_ID ;
SELECT DRLR*0.35 AS OPLR, DRLR*0.65 AS SLLR, * FROM ( SELECT num*sig_price as allprice , num*SIG_R_PRICE as all_r_price , SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE profit_s , num * (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE) AS PROFIT , CASE WHEN SIG_PRICE>0 THEN (SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE)/SIG_PRICE *100 ELSE NULL END AS LRL -- 利润率 , SIG_R_PRICE-SIG_PRICE+ISNULL(SIG_OP_PRICE,0.0) AS DRLR -- 单人利润 , A.* , B.lock -- 价格锁定状态 FROM ENQ_PRICE A INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN B ON A.ENQ_ID = B.ENQ_ID WHERE B.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND B.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ) AS TEMP WHERE 1=1

Set.Name: up
Set.Sql: update ENQ_PRICE set ~EWA_FIELD_ID=@EWA_FIELD_VAL where ENQ_PRICE_ID=@ENQ_PRICE_ID

Set.Name: lock
Set.Sql: update enq_main set lock=1 where enq_id=@enq_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id; select lock from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id;

Set.Name: unlock
Set.Sql: update enq_main set lock=0 where enq_id=@enq_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id; select lock from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id and sup_id=@g_sup_id;

Set.Name: CheckError SQL2
Set.Sql:
SELECT '已经成团在此修改会影响预算，请重新开放！' as EWA_ERR_OUT FROM GRP_MAIN WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_UNENQ';
SELECT '审批流程已到等待客户确认，不能修改' EWA_ERR_OUT from ENQ_MAIN em inner join ENQ_PRICE ep on ep.ENQ_ID = em.ENQ_ID inner join GRP_MAIN gm on em.GRP_ID=gm.GRP_ID where ep.ENQ_PRICE_ID = @ENQ_PRICE_ID and em.FLOW_STATE in ('ENQ_END','ENQ_CONTRACT_VALID') and gm.GRP_RUN_MODEL='GRP_RUN_SINGLE' -- 散拼可以改，要改航班和日期，2025-01-22，吕国芳

select COIN_ID,COIN_KEY from SYS_COIN

Set.Info: 锁定后报价不会再随修改行程和报价单变化，可人工设定报价，鼠标双击“黄色区域”
After the lock, the quote will not change with the modification of the itinerary and the quotation. You can manually set the quote and double-click the “Yellow Area”
解除锁定后，价格随修改行程自动变化
After the unlock, the price changes automatically with the modified itinerary
‘/’符号用来区分单价差价格（不含单间差/含单间差）
The '/' symbol is used to differentiate the price per unit difference (excluding single/single room difference)

Set.Top: Tip:[预]预算价格，[询]询价价格，点击询价显示询价单信息，点击预算显示修改价格窗口
Set.Bottom:
一、单项服务每天每人拆分价格(不可修改)

二、供应商总计价格(不可修改)

三、变更要求

四、价格核算

*说明:
1.锁定后报价列不会再随修改行程和报价单儿变化
2.若学要解除锁定请按‘解除锁定’按钮
3.带‘/’的价格（不含单间差/含单间差）

Set.Name: X SQL
Set.Sql: select * from ser_main where SUP_ID=3 and ser_id in ( select ser_id from ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB where enq_jny_id in( select enq_jny_id from enq_jny where enq_id=@enq_id) group by ser_id ) order by ser_id

Set.Name: Y SQL
Set.Sql:
select * from ( select ej.enq_jny_id as enq_jny_id , ENQ_JNY_DAY , case when TRAFFIC='AIR' THEN '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as nvarchar(10))+'天('+dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'/')+')' ELSE '第'+cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY as nvarchar(10))+'天('+dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,null,'-')+')' END as enq_jny_day1 , sc.coin_id , sc.coin_key from enq_jny ej inner join ENQ_JNY_SER_sub es on ej.enq_jny_id =es.enq_jny_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=es.coin_id where enq_id=@enq_id group by ej.enq_jny_id ,ENQ_JNY_DAY,way_code,TRAFFIC,F_ADD,TO_ADD,TO_ADD2,sc.coin_id,sc.coin_key
union all
SELECT -10*gs.COIN_ID enq_jny_id , -10*gs.COIN_ID as ENQ_JNY_DAY , '小计/'+sc.coin_key as enq_jny_id1 , gs.coin_id , sc.coin_key from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join enq_main e on e.enq_id=gj.enq_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=gs.COIN_ID where gj.enq_id=@ENQ_ID GROUP BY gs.COIN_ID, sc.coin_key
union all select -1 as enq_jny_id ,-1 as ENQ_JNY_DAY ,'合计/'+coin_key as enq_jny_id1 ,sc.coin_id , sc.coin_key from enq_main e inner join grp_main g on e.grp_id=g.grp_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=g.GRP_COIN where enq_id=@enq_id ) aa
order by case when ENQ_JNY_DAY =-1 then 999999 when ENQ_JNY_DAY <-9 then 888888 else ENQ_JNY_DAY end

Set.Name: DATA SQL
Set.Sql:
select ser_id , gs.enq_jny_id , sc.coin_id , replace( case when sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) =0 or sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) is null then '' else '[预]' + cast(sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE) as varchar(10)) + ' x ' + convert(varchar,max(SUB_NUM)) + ' = ' + convert(varchar,sum(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * sub_num)) +'/'+coin_key end,'.00','' ) ENQ_JNY_PRICE from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=gs.coin_id where enq_id=@enq_id and not sup_down_id is null and gs.sub_tag='auto' group by gs.enq_jny_id ,ser_id,sc.coin_id,coin_key
union all
SELECT SER_ID , -10 * COIN_ID enq_jny_id , COIN_ID , convert(varchar,convert(decimal(18,2),SUM(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * SUB_NUM))) ENQ_JNY_PRICE from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join enq_main e on e.enq_id=gj.enq_id where gj.enq_id=@ENQ_ID GROUP BY COIN_ID, SER_ID
union all
SELECT SER_ID , -1 as enq_jny_id , GRP_COIN as coin_id , CONVERT(VARCHAR,convert(decimal(18,2),SUM(P1*GRP_POINT))) ENQ_JNY_PRICE FROM ( SELECT E.GRP_ID, COIN_ID, SER_ID, SUM(ENQ_JNY_PRICE * SUB_NUM) P1 from enq_jny_ser_sub gs inner join enq_jny gj on gs.enq_jny_id=gj.enq_jny_id inner join enq_main e on e.enq_id=gj.enq_id where gj.enq_id=@ENQ_ID GROUP BY E.GRP_ID, COIN_ID, SER_ID ) A inner join grp_main g on A.grp_id=g.grp_id INNER JOIN GRP_COIN H ON A.GRP_ID=H.GRP_ID AND H.COIN_FROM=A.COIN_ID AND H.COIN_TO=G.GRP_COIN inner join sys_coin sc on sc.coin_id=GRP_COIN GROUP BY SER_ID,GRP_COIN,coin_key

Set.Name: enq_op_main sql
Set.Sql: SELECT a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID , a.SER_ID , a.SUP_DOWN_ID , a.SUB_NUM , bb.ENQ_OP_ID , bb.ENQ_OP_STATE , bb.SELECT_STATE , b.enq_jny_price_sup , a.enq_jny_id , b.enq_jny_price , b.sup_down_id AS vid , b.sub_num AS vnum , d.sup_name , e.coin_key , e.COIN_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB B ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID AND ( ( a.SER_CITY_ID = b.SER_CITY_ID AND isnull(a.SER_KEY0, -1) = isnull(b.SER_KEY0, -1) AND isnull(a.SER_KEY1, -1) = isnull(b.SER_KEY1, -1) AND isnull(a.SER_KEY2, -1) = isnull(b.SER_KEY2, -1) ) OR a.SER_CONN_ID = b.SER_CONN_ID ) INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN bb ON b.ENQ_OP_ID = bb.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN enq_main c ON bb.enq_id = c.enq_id AND BB.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' LEFT JOIN sup_main d ON b.sup_down_id = d.sup_id LEFT JOIN sys_coin e ON b.coin_id_sup = e.coin_id WHERE bb.enq_id = @enq_id

SELECT CITY_ID ,A.CITY_NAME,A.CITY_NAME_EN,AA FROM CITY A LEFT JOIN ( select CID,COUNT(*) AA from [V_ENQ_JNY_CITYS] WHERE CID=@cid group by CID ) B ON A.CITY_ID=B.CID WHERE A.COUNTRY_ID=@cid AND A.COUNTRY_ID<>A.CITY_ID
ORDER BY AA DESC, A.CITY_HOT DESC ,A.CITY_NAME

Set.Name: createGyapDoc
importJny
GetEnqId SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT TOP 1 case when @IMP_JNY='GRP' then c.ENQ_ID else a.ENQ_ID end FROM_ENQ_ID ,b.GRP_GYAP_ID FROM V_GRP_MAIN a left join GRP_GYAP_DOC b on a.GRP_ID=b.GRP_ID left join ENQ_MAIN c ON c.GRP_ID=b.GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID WHERE (a.GRP_ID=@FROM_GRP_ID or (@FROM_GRP_ID is null and b.GRP_GYAP_ID=@GRP_GYAP_ID)) AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ;
SELECT TOP 1 ENQ_ID TO_ENQ_ID FROM ENQ_MAIN B WHERE B.GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND (B.ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' OR ENQ_SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE') AND B.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID ORDER BY ENQ_SELECT_STATE desc ;

Set.Name: fromOpportunity
Set.Sql: SELECT b.GRP_GYAP_ID ,b.GRP_GYAP_DAYS S_DAYS ,a.OPP_CRM_COM_ID CRM_COM_ID ,isnull(OPP_CITY_ID,OPP_PROVINCE_ID) S_FROM ,OPP_GRP_SDATE S_FDATE ,OPP_GRP_NUM S_PEOPLE ,OPP_USR_MEMO S_OTHERS ,OPP_TITLE GRP_NAME from CRM_OPPORTUNITY a left join GRP_GYAP_DOC b on a.OPP_REF_TABLE ='GRP_MAIN' and b.GRP_ID = a.OPP_REF_ID where a.OPP_ID = @OPP_ID

Set.Name: init sql
Set.Sql: SELECT TOP 1 GRP_SDATE S_FDATE,F_CITY S_FROM,PEOPLE_NUM S_PEOPLE,DAY_NUM S_DAYS,GRP_NAME ,HEAD_NUM FROM V_GRP_MAIN A INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN B ON A.ENQ_ID=B.ENQ_ID LEFT join grp_gyap_doc c on a.grp_id=c.grp_id WHERE (a.GRP_ID=@FROM_GRP_ID or (@FROM_GRP_ID is null and c.GRP_GYAP_ID=@GRP_GYAP_ID)) AND A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: newNullGaypDoc
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO GRP_GYAP_DOC ( GRP_GYAP_STATE, SUP_ID, ADM_ID, CREATE_DATE , GRP_GYAP_NAME, GRP_GYAP_DAYS, GRP_GYAP_UNID , GRP_GYAP_TYPE , GRP_ID, GRP_GYAP_REF_GRP_ID ) select 'USED', SUP_ID, @G_ADM_ID, @SYS_DATE , GRP_NAME, @S_DAYS, @sys_UNID , case when isnull(bas_tag_para7, '')='' then 'GRP_TMP_THEME' else bas_tag_para7 end GRP_GYAP_TYPE -- 默认游学 , GRP_ID, @FROM_GRP_ID from grp_main a left join bas_tag b on a.GRP_TYPE=bas_tag where a.grp_id=@grp_id and a.sup_id=@G_SUP_ID and not exists(SELECT 1 from GRP_GYAP_DOC where grp_id=@grp_id and GRP_GYAP_STATE='USED')

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: with w_invoices as ( select count(1) INVOICES,FILE_RID from sys_atts where file_from='ENQ_OP_MAIN-INVOICE' and file_status='COM_YES' group by FILE_RID ), w_budget as ( SELECT k.enq_op_id OPID, B.COIN_NAME, B.COIN_ID, sum(s.enq_jny_price* s.SUB_NUM) BASE_PRICE, sum(k.enq_jny_price_sup * (k.SUB_NUM - ISNULL(k.eoms_free, 0)) ) AS SUP_PRICE -- eoms_free 免额 FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB K INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN K2 ON K.ENQ_OP_ID=K2.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN K3 ON K2.ENQ_ID=K3.ENQ_ID inner join V_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB s on s.ENQ_JNY_DAY=K.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY and s.SER_CITY_ID=K.SER_CITY_ID and s.SER_ID=k.SER_ID and K.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX=s.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX and k.FRO_GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID and K3.ENQ_ID=s.ENQ_ID INNER JOIN ( select COIN_ID,CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' then COIN_KEY ELSE COIN_NAME END COIN_NAME,COIN_KEY from SYS_COIN ) B ON K.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID WHERE K.sup_id = @G_SUP_ID and K.fro_grp_id = @GRP_ID and isnull(k.SUB_NUM,1)!=0 GROUP BY K.enq_op_id, B.COIN_ID, B.COIN_NAME ), w_DIFF as ( --询价和预算全部折算成rmb后的差额 SELECT OPID,BASE_PRICE , SUP_PRICE , SUP_PRICE -BASE_PRICE DIFF_PRICE , A.COIN_ID FROM ( SELECT K.enq_op_id OPID,K.COIN_ID,s.COIN_ID COIN_ID_JNY ,K.SUP_DOWN_ID, DBO.f_getpricebycoin(K3.GRP_ID,s.COIN_ID,1,sum(s.enq_jny_price * s.SUB_NUM)) BASE_PRICE, -- 使用询价单中的价格 DBO.f_getpricebycoin(K3.GRP_ID,k.COIN_ID,1,sum(k.enq_jny_price_SUP * (isnull(k.SUB_NUM,s.SUB_NUM) - isnull(k.eoms_free, 0) ))) AS SUP_PRICE FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB K INNER JOIN ENQ_OP_MAIN K2 ON K.ENQ_OP_ID=K2.ENQ_OP_ID INNER JOIN ENQ_MAIN K3 ON K2.ENQ_ID=K3.ENQ_ID inner join V_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB s on s.ENQ_JNY_DAY=K.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY and s.SER_CITY_ID=K.SER_CITY_ID and s.SER_ID=k.SER_ID and K.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX=s.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX and k.FRO_GRP_ID=s.GRP_ID and K3.ENQ_ID=s.ENQ_ID WHERE K3.GRP_ID=@GRP_ID and isnull(k.SUB_NUM,1)!=0 GROUP BY K.enq_op_id, K.SUP_DOWN_ID,K.COIN_ID,s.COIN_ID,K3.GRP_ID ) A ), w_grp_peoples as( SELECT count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id AS grpId FROM grp_costumer g WHERE COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' and grp_id = @grp_id GROUP BY g.grp_id ), w_sup_contracts as ( -- 供应商合同 SELECT B_SUP_ID,SUP_CON_ID, CASE WHEN SUP_CON_IMG IS NULL OR SUP_CON_IMG ='' THEN NULL ELSE '1' END AS SUP_CON_FILES FROM SUP_CONTRACT WHERE A_SUP_ID=@G_SUP_ID AND SUP_CON_STATE='USED' AND SUP_CON_DEFAULT='COM_YES' ), order_sub as ( select a.*, changes.* from V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A left join( select a.fro_enq_op_sub_id, coin_id order_change_coin , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_NUM) as order_change_num from GRP_SER_SP a WHERE a.GRP_SER_SP_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' group by fro_enq_op_sub_id, coin_id ) changes on changes.fro_enq_op_sub_id = a.enq_op_sub_id WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ), SER_SUB as ( -- 此订单的所有日程和服务的清单，包含新增的服务 SELECT a.*, changes.*, ord_detail.enq_op_id as id0,ord_detail1.enq_op_id as id1 from V_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a inner join ( select distinct enq_op_id, enq_jny_day, GRP_ID from V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) ord_detail on a.enq_jny_day = ord_detail.enq_jny_day and a.GRP_ID = ord_detail.GRP_ID inner join ( select distinct enq_op_id, SER_ID, GRP_ID from V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ) ord_detail1 on a.SER_ID = ord_detail1.SER_ID and a.GRP_ID = ord_detail1.GRP_ID and ord_detail.enq_op_id = ord_detail1.enq_op_id left join ( select a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, coin_id ser_change_coin , sum(case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' then 1 else -1 end * GRP_SER_SP_NUM) as ser_change_num from GRP_SER_SP a WHERE a.GRP_SER_SP_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' and GRP_ID = @GRP_ID group by FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID, coin_id ) changes on a.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID = changes.FRO_ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_ID WHERE a.ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE' -- 当前选中的询价单 and a.GRP_ID = @GRP_ID ), order_ser_diff as ( select enq_op_id_all, count(*) as changes from( SELECT ser_sub.enq_jny_date as sub_enq_jny_date , isnull(a.enq_op_id, SER_SUB.id0) enq_op_id_all , a.enq_op_id, SER_SUB.id0 , case -- 新增，订单中没有 when a.enq_op_id is null then SER_SUB.sub_num - isnull(ser_change_num,0) -- 删除，询价单没有 when id0 is null then a.SUB_NUM + isnull(order_change_num,0) -- 修改，日期不同 when a.ENQ_JNY_Date != SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_Date then 1 -- 修改而且日期相同 else SER_SUB.SUB_NUM - (a.SUB_NUM + isnull(order_change_num,0)) end as ch FROM order_sub a left JOIN SER_SUB ON -- 当前有效的询价单 SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_DAY = a.FRO_ENQ_JNY_DAY -- 按照天的顺序链接 AND A.SER_CITY_ID = SER_SUB.SER_CITY_ID AND A.SER_ID = SER_SUB.SER_ID AND A.FRO_GRP_ID = SER_SUB.GRP_ID and a.enq_op_id = ser_sub.id0 and A.ENQ_OP_SUB_ID_INDEX = SER_SUB.ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB_INDEX ) a WHERE ch !=0 group by enq_op_id_all ), w_sps as ( select gss.SUP_DOWN_ID,sm.SER_ID,gft.COIN_ID,sum(gft.COS_PRICE) SP_PRICE,sum(gf.ACCOUNT) SP_PAID from GRP_SER_SP gss inner join SER_MAIN sm on gss.SER_TAG = sm.SER_TAG and sm.SUP_ID = 3 left join GRP_FIN_TYPE gft on gft.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'GRP_SER_SP' AND gft.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID = gss.GRP_SER_SP_ID left join GRP_FINANCE gf on gft.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID= gf.GRP_FIN_TYPE and gf.pay_status='PAY_YES' and gf.fin_types='FIN_PAY' where gss.grp_id=@grp_id and gss.GSSM_ID is null group by gss.SUP_DOWN_ID,gft.COIN_ID,sm.SER_ID ), w_has_sp as ( -- 有相同服务的变更单的采购单 select eom.SUP_ID ,em.GRP_ID , eom.ENQ_OP_ID EOID, w.COIN_ID,max(w.SP_PRICE) SP_PRICE, max(SP_PAID) SP_PAID from ENQ_OP_MAIN eom inner join ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB eoms on eom.ENQ_OP_ID = eoms.ENQ_OP_ID inner join enq_main em on eom.ENQ_ID = em.ENQ_ID inner join w_sps w on eom.sup_id=w.SUP_DOWN_ID and eoms.ser_id=w.SER_ID where em.grp_id=@grp_id group by eom.SUP_ID ,em.GRP_ID , eom.ENQ_OP_ID, w.COIN_ID ), W_FilteredData AS ( SELECT A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, A.COS_PRICE, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM FROM grp_fin_type A WHERE A.grp_id = @grp_id AND A.fin_type = '0' AND (A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' ) AND A.sup_id = @G_SUP_ID ), W_OP_PLAN AS ( SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM W_FilteredData WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_OP_PAY AS ( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, SUM(ISNULL(gf.ACCOUNT, 0)) AS PAY_REAL FROM W_FilteredData A LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE AND B.APPLY_SUP_ID = A.SUP_ID AND B.APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' left join GRP_FINANCE gf on A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID=gf.GRP_FIN_TYPE and B.APPLY_ID=gf.APPLY_ID and gf.pay_status='PAY_YES' and gf.fin_types='FIN_PAY' WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' GROUP BY A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_OP AS( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, a.PAY_PLAN,b.PAY_REAL FROM W_OP_PLAN A INNER JOIN W_OP_PAY B ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.RELATE_SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID AND A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID=B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ) SELECT a.* , quote_adm.adm_name as quote_adm , create_adm.adm_name as create_adm , sp.SP_PRICE , sp.SP_PAID , wop.PAY_REAL payment , isnull(wop.PAY_PLAN,0)+isnull(sp.SP_PRICE,0)-isnull(wop.PAY_REAL,0)-isnull(sp.SP_PAID,0) unpay , gg.grp_id , gg.GRP_HY_CODE , gg.GRP_SDATE , b.bas_tag_html+CASE WHEN CONFIRM_NO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE +' NO:'+ CONFIRM_NO END bas_tag_html , dbo.f_ser_idToname(ser_ids) AS ser_names , CASE WHEN ((ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE') or (ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' and gg.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW')) AND @EWA_LANG<>'enus' THEN '正常状态' WHEN ((ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE') or (ENQ_DEFAULT='COM_YES' and gg.GRP_STA='SCM_GRP_STA_NEW')) AND @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN 'normal status' WHEN @EWA_LANG<>'enus' THEN '作废（重新询价）' ELSE 'Obsolete (re-quote)' END AS ST , HEAD_NUM , PEOPLE_NUM , isnull(d.nums,0 )AS nums , CASE WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 THEN '一致' WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 THEN'少人' WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 THEN'多人' END AS isok , e.SUP_NAME , dd.* , CASE WHEN PIC_PHY_PATH IS NULL OR PIC_PHY_PATH='' THEN NULL ELSE '1' END PURCHASE_CONTRACTS -- 采购合同 , DBO.F_ENQ_OP_ISCAN_DEL(A.ENQ_OP_ID) AS DELE , DBO.F_PART_JNY_SEND(A.ENQ_OP_ID) AS PJSTA , CASE WHEN STP.BAS_TAG='SUP_GRD_ORD' THEN '现金支出' ELSE STP.BAS_TAG_NAME END AS STPP , E.SUP_PID , SC.* , CASE WHEN 'enus' = @EWA_LANG then CASE WHEN DIFF_PRICE>0 THEN 'Over' WHEN DIFF_PRICE=0 THEN 'Equal' WHEN DIFF_PRICE<0 THEN 'Low' END ELSE CASE WHEN DIFF_PRICE>0 THEN '超出预算' WHEN DIFF_PRICE=0 THEN '等于预算' WHEN DIFF_PRICE<0 THEN '低于预算' END END as DIFF_YS , INVOICES.INVOICES , order_ser_diff.changes -- 服务差异（包括，删除，新增，修改，日期改变） FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a INNER JOIN bas_tag b ON a.state=b.bas_tag INNER JOIN enq_main c ON a.enq_id=c.enq_id INNER JOIN grp_main gg ON c.grp_id=gg.grp_id left join adm_user quote_adm on a.ENQ_OP_QUOTE_ADM = quote_adm.adm_id left join adm_user create_adm on a.adm_id = create_adm.adm_id left join order_ser_diff on order_ser_diff.enq_op_id_all = a.enq_op_id left JOIN ( select distinct sd_ref_id from SHARE_DATA WHERE sd_tag = 'GRP_MAIN' and (sd_data = @sup_id) ) SHARE_DATA on gg.grp_id = SHARE_DATA.sd_ref_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BAS_TAG, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN ISNULL(BAS_TAG_NAME_EN,BAS_TAG_NAME)ELSE BAS_TAG_NAME END BAS_TAG_NAME FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='SUP_OP_TP' ) STP ON A.SUP_TYPE=STP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN w_grp_peoples AS d ON d.grpId=gg.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN ISNULL(SUP_NAME_EN,SUP_NAME) ELSE SUP_NAME END SUP_NAME ,SUP_ID,SUP_PID FROM sup_main union SELECT CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN '-- Bidding --' ELSE '-- 竞价 --' END, -1, null ) e ON a.sup_id=e.sup_id LEFT JOIN w_budget dd ON A.ENQ_OP_ID=dd.OPID -- 供应商合同数量 LEFT JOIN w_sup_contracts SC ON A.SUP_ID =SC.B_SUP_ID --询价和预算全部折算成rmb后的差额 LEFT JOIN w_DIFF as diff ON A.ENQ_OP_ID=DIFF.OPID and Dd.COIN_ID=DIFF.COIN_ID --20230808 JZP 增加上传供应商账单 left join w_invoices as INVOICES on INVOICES.FILE_RID=a.ENQ_OP_ID left join W_OP wop on wop.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID = a.ENQ_OP_ID and wop.COIN_ID = isnull(dd.COIN_ID,wop.COIN_ID) left join w_has_sp sp on a.ENQ_OP_ID=sp.EOID and sp.COIN_ID = isnull(dd.COIN_ID,sp.COIN_ID) WHERE OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID -- ewa_test @RID IS not NULL AND a.ENQ_OP_ID=@RID -- ewa_test @sup_id is not NULL and sd_ref_id>0 and a.FLOW_STATE!='FLOW_OP' -- ewa_test @BAT = '1' AND (A.ENQ_ORD_ID=@ENQ_ORD_ID OR GRP_DAY_BUS_ORD_ID=@ORD_ID) -- ewa_test @ewa_recycle is null AND (A.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED') -- ewa_test @ewa_recycle is not null AND (A.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'DEL') -- ewa_test @grp_id is not null AND gg.grp_id = @grp_id -- ewa_test @SER_ID='1' and (a.ser_ids=1 or a.ser_ids like '1,%') -- 机票 -- ewa_test @SELECT_STATE is not null AND ISNULL(a.SELECT_STATE, 'CHECKED_FALSE') = @SELECT_STATE -- ewa_test ORDER BY enq_op_id DESC

Set.Name: OnFrameDelete SQL
ExtendAction0 SQL
Set.Sql: PR_ENQ_OP_PACT (@ENQ_ID,@enq_OP_id, @EWA_WF_NEXT)

Set.Name: NEW_MENU_2019 SQL
Set.Sql: SELECT gg.grp_id, gg.GRP_SDATE, b.bas_tag_html+CASE WHEN CONFIRM_NO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE +' NO:'+ CONFIRM_NO END bas_tag_html, dbo.f_ser_idToname(ser_ids) AS ser_names, CASE WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE' AND @EWA_LANG<>'enus' THEN '正常状态' WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE ='CHECKED_TRUE' AND @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN 'normal status' WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE <>'CHECKED_TRUE' AND @EWA_LANG<>'enus' THEN '作废（重新询价）' ELSE 'Obsolete (re-quote)' END AS ST, HEAD_NUM, PEOPLE_NUM, isnull(d.nums,0)AS nums, CASE WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)=0 THEN '一致' WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)>0 THEN'少人' WHEN HEAD_NUM+PEOPLE_NUM-isnull(d.nums,0)<0 THEN'多人' END AS isok , a.*, e.SUP_NAME, GRP_HY_CODE, dd.*, CASE WHEN PIC_PHY_PATH IS NULL OR PIC_PHY_PATH='' THEN '' ELSE '合同' END a ,DBO.F_ENQ_OP_ISCAN_DEL(A.ENQ_OP_ID)AS DELE ,DBO.F_PART_JNY_SEND(A.ENQ_OP_ID) AS PJSTA ,CASE WHEN STP.BAS_TAG='SUP_GRD_ORD' THEN '现金支出' ELSE STP.BAS_TAG_NAME END AS STPP,E.SUP_PID FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a INNER JOIN bas_tag b ON a.state=b.bas_tag INNER JOIN enq_main c ON a.enq_id=c.enq_id AND C.ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE' INNER JOIN grp_main gg ON c.grp_id=gg.grp_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BAS_TAG,CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN ISNULL(BAS_TAG_NAME_EN,BAS_TAG_NAME)ELSE BAS_TAG_NAME END BAS_TAG_NAME FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP='SUP_OP_TP')STP ON A.SUP_TYPE=STP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT count(g.cos_id) nums, g.grp_id AS grpId FROM grp_costumer g WHERE COS_STATUS='COS_NEW' GROUP BY g.grp_id ) AS d ON d.grpId=gg.grp_id INNER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' THEN ISNULL(SUP_NAME_EN,SUP_NAME) ELSE SUP_NAME END SUP_NAME ,SUP_ID,SUP_PID FROM sup_main ) e ON a.sup_id=e.sup_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT enq_op_id OPID, COIN_NAME, sum(enq_jny_price* SUB_NUM) BASE_PRICE, sum(enq_jny_price_op * SUB_NUM)AS OP_PRICE, sum(enq_jny_price_sup* SUB_NUM) AS SUP_PRICE FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ( select COIN_ID,CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG='enus' then COIN_KEY ELSE COIN_NAME END COIN_NAME,COIN_KEY from SYS_COIN ) B ON A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID WHERE sup_id=@G_SUP_ID GROUP BY enq_op_id, COIN_NAME ) Dd ON A.ENQ_OP_ID=Dd.OPID WHERE OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND (A.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED') AND gg.GRP_SDATE between @DT_START AND @DT_END ORDER BY gg.GRP_SDATE desc, enq_op_id DESC

Set.Name: ExtendAction2 SQL
Set.Sql: INSERT INTO SYS_STATUS( SYS_STA_RID, SYS_STA_TABLE, SYS_STA_TAG, SYS_STA_VAL, SYS_STA_CDATE, SYS_STA_MEMO, SUP_ID, ADM_ID)VALUES( @ENQ_OP_ID, 'ENQ_OP_MAIN', @EWA_WF_NAME, @EWA_WF_NEXT, @SYS_DATE, @EWA_WF_UMSG, @G_SUP_ID, @G_ADM_ID);

Set.Name: 选中询价单
生成支出计划
Set.Sql:
DELETE FROM GRP_FIN_TYPE WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND FIN_TYPE = '0' AND RELATE_SUP_ID = @SUP_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='ENQ_OP_MAIN' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID=@ENQ_OP_ID;
INSERT INTO GRP_FIN_TYPE( GRP_ID, ENQ_ID, SUP_ID, FIN_TYPE_NAME, COS_PRICE, FIN_TYPE, FIN_TYPE_GROUP , RELATE_SUP_ID, TYPE_MEMO, COIN_ID, FLAGS, SALES_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_CDATE , GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, UNID ) SELECT @GRP_ID, @ENQ_ID, @G_SUP_ID, '供应商支付计划', pp, 0, 'FINTYP_IN' , @SUP_ID, '向供应商支付服务费：'+sup_name, coin_id, @FLAGS, @G_ADM_ID, GETDATE() , 'ENQ_OP_MAIN', @ENQ_OP_ID, NEWID() FROM ( select -1 AS FF,999999 AS SS ,'总价' AS DD , @SUP_ID AS GG , cast(sum(isnull(isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,enq_jny_price)*sub_num ,0.0)) as varchar)+'/'+COIN_KEY as sup_name , a.coin_id,sum(isnull(isnull(ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,enq_jny_price)*sub_num ,0.0)) pp from ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB a inner join sys_coin b on a.coin_id=b.coin_id where a.enq_jny_id in ( select col from dbo.f_split(@ENQ_JNY_IDS,',') ) and a.sup_down_id=@SUP_ID and a.enq_op_id = @enq_op_id group by a.coin_id, b.COIN_KEY ) AS TEMP

Set.Name: 生成支出计划2
Set.Sql:
DELETE FROM GRP_FIN_TYPE WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID AND FIN_TYPE= '0' AND RELATE_SUP_ID=@SUP_ID AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='GRP_SER_SP' AND GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID IS NOT NULL ; INSERT INTO GRP_FIN_TYPE( GRP_ID, ENQ_ID, SUP_ID, FIN_TYPE_NAME, COS_PRICE, FIN_TYPE, FIN_TYPE_GROUP , RELATE_SUP_ID, TYPE_MEMO , COIN_ID, FLAGS, SALES_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_CDATE , GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, UNID )
SELECT @GRP_ID, @ENQ_ID, @G_SUP_ID,'供应商变更服务支付计划', sub_price, 0, 'FINTYP_IN' , @SUP_ID, '向供应商支付变更服务费：'+cast(sub_price as varchar)+'/'+coin_key , coin_id, @FLAGS, @G_ADM_ID, GETDATE() , 'GRP_SER_SP', GRP_SER_SP_ID, NEWID() FROM ( SELECT case when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE ='cut' then isnull((GRP_SER_SP_NUM*GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*(-1)) ,0.0) when GRP_SER_SP_TYPE ='add' then isnull((GRP_SER_SP_NUM*GRP_SER_SP_PRICE) ,0.0) else 0.0 end as sub_price , b.coin_key , a.* FROM GRP_SER_SP a inner join sys_coin b on a.coin_id=b.coin_id WHERE GRP_ID = @grp_id and sup_down_id = @SUP_ID and gssm_id is null -- 变更单会覆盖供应商的服务价格，因此不用重复支出 ) as temp

Set.Name: 审批获得grp_id
Set.Sql: select grp_id from enq_main where enq_id=@enq_id

Set.Name: setenqid
生成支出计划PR
生成支出计划2PR
backto
选中询价单(地接单)
Set.Sql: UPDATE ENQ_OP_MAIN SET SELECT_STATE='CHECKED_TRUE' WHERE ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID;

Set.Name: reset_part
Set.Sql: PR_RESET_PART_JNY_BY_ENQ_UPDATE(@enq_op_id)

Set.Name: CHECK_ERR
Set.Sql:
select '询价单已作废，不能下单。请先尝试[重置]操作，如果重置失败请重做采购单。' EWA_ERR_OUT from ENQ_OP_Main a inner join enq_main b on a.ENQ_ID = b.ENQ_ID where ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID and b.ENQ_SELECT_STATE != 'CHECKED_TRUE' ;
SELECT DBO.[f_stradd_ENQ_OP_SUB_REPEAT](@GRP_ID,@ENQ_ID,@ENQ_OP_ID,@SUP_ID) EWA_ERR_OUT FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN WHERE ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID and ISNULL(SELECT_STATE,'')!='CHECKED_TRUE'

Set.Name: payments
Set.Sql: WITH W_FilteredData AS ( SELECT A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID, A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, A.COS_PRICE, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM FROM grp_fin_type A WHERE A.grp_id = @GRP_ID AND A.fin_type = '0' AND (A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' or GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM='GRP_SER_SP') AND A.sup_id = @G_SUP_ID ), W_OP_PLAN AS ( SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS PAY_PLAN FROM W_FilteredData WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_OP_PAY AS ( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID, SUM(ISNULL(ACCOUNT, 0)) AS PAY_REAL FROM W_FilteredData A LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE AND B.APPLY_SUP_ID = A.SUP_ID AND B.APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' GROUP BY A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_OP AS( SELECT A.*,B.PAY_REAL FROM W_OP_PLAN A INNER JOIN W_OP_PAY B ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.RELATE_SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID AND A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID=B.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ), W_SP_PLAN AS ( SELECT RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID, SUM(COS_PRICE) AS SP_PAY_PLAN FROM W_FilteredData WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'GRP_SER_SP' GROUP BY RELATE_SUP_ID, COIN_ID ), W_SP_PAY AS ( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(ISNULL(ACCOUNT, 0)) AS SP_PAY_REAL FROM W_FilteredData A LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE AND B.APPLY_SUP_ID = A.SUP_ID AND B.APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' WHERE GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM = 'GRP_SER_SP' GROUP BY A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ), W_SP AS( SELECT A.*,B.SP_PAY_REAL FROM W_SP_PLAN A INNER JOIN W_SP_PAY B ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.RELATE_SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID ) SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID ,isnull(A.PAY_PLAN,0) PAY_PLAN,isnull(A.PAY_REAL,0) PAY_REAL ,isnull(B.SP_PAY_PLAN,0) SP_PAY_PLAN,isnull(B.SP_PAY_REAL,0) SP_PAY_REAL ,C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM W_OP A LEFT JOIN W_SP B ON A.RELATE_SUP_ID=B.RELATE_SUP_ID AND A.COIN_ID=B.COIN_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON A.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID WHERE 1=1

Set.Name: 变更服务单SQL
Set.Sql:
select a.*, b.COIN_NAME, b.COIN_KEY from ( select GRP_ID , SUP_DOWN_ID , COIN_ID , SUM(CASE WHEN GRP_SER_SP_TYPE='ADD' THEN GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*GRP_SER_SP_NUM ELSE GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*GRP_SER_SP_NUM * -1 END) GRP_SER_SP_PRICE from GRP_SER_SP where GRP_ID = @GRP_ID AND GSSM_ID is null and sup_id = @g_sup_id group by GRP_ID, SUP_DOWN_ID, COIN_ID ) a left join sys_coin b on a.COIN_ID = b.COIN_ID where 1=1 order by a.SUP_DOWN_ID,a.COIN_ID;
SELECT G.SUP_ID,G.COIN_ID ,G.SP_PAY_PLAN,G.SP_PAY_REAL,C.COIN_NAME, C.COIN_KEY FROM ( SELECT A.RELATE_SUP_ID AS SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID, SUM(A.COS_PRICE) AS SP_PAY_PLAN ,SUM(isnull(ACCOUNT,0)) AS SP_PAY_REAL FROM grp_fin_type A LEFT JOIN GRP_PAY_APPLY B ON A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID = B.GRP_FIN_TYPE AND B.APPLY_SUP_ID = a.SUP_ID AND B.APPLY_STATUS = 'VIS_FIN_END' where A.grp_id=@grp_id and A.fin_type='0' AND A.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM='GRP_SER_SP' and A.sup_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY A.RELATE_SUP_ID, A.COIN_ID ) G LEFT JOIN SYS_COIN C ON G.COIN_ID = C.COIN_ID WHERE 1=1 order by G.SUP_ID,G.COIN_ID

Set.Name: 预算价格和供应商价格
Set.Sql: SELECT BASE_PRICE,SUP_PRICE+ISNULL(SP_PRICE,0) SUP_PRICE FROM ( SELECT enq_op_id OPID,COIN_ID,SUP_DOWN_ID, DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,COIN_ID,1,sum(enq_jny_price* SUB_NUM)) BASE_PRICE, DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,COIN_ID,1,sum(enq_jny_price_SUP* SUB_NUM)) AS SUP_PRICE FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB WHERE ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID GROUP BY enq_op_id, SUP_DOWN_ID,COIN_ID ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUP_DOWN_ID,SUM(PRICE) SP_PRICE FROM ( SELECT *, CASE WHEN GRP_SER_SP_TYPE ='CUT' THEN DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,COIN_ID,1,GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*GRP_SER_SP_NUM)*-1 ELSE DBO.f_getpricebycoin(@GRP_ID,COIN_ID,1,GRP_SER_SP_PRICE*GRP_SER_SP_NUM) END PRICE FROM GRP_SER_SP WHERE GRP_ID=@GRP_ID )TEMP GROUP BY SUP_DOWN_ID )B ON A.SUP_DOWN_ID=B.SUP_DOWN_ID

Set.Name: 取消选中询价单
获取有支出计划且未下单采购单
Set.Sql:
SELECT DBO.[f_stradd_ENQ_OP_SUB_REPEAT](@GRP_ID,@ENQ_ID,@ENQ_OP_ID,@SUP_ID) DUP_SER FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN WHERE ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID and ISNULL(SELECT_STATE,'')!='CHECKED_TRUE' ;
SELECT * from ( SELECT a.ENQ_OP_ID OLD_ENQ_OP_ID,dbo.f_ser_idToname(a.ser_ids) AS SER_NAMES, k.ENQ_OP_ID HAS_SAME_SER FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a inner join enq_main b on a.enq_id=b.enq_id left join ENQ_OP_MAIN k on a.ENQ_OP_ID=k.ENQ_OP_ID and exists( SELECT 1 FROM V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB XA INNER JOIN V_ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB XB ON XA.ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID AND XB.ENQ_OP_ID =k.ENQ_OP_ID AND XA.ENQ_JNY_DAY=XB.ENQ_JNY_DAY AND XA.SER_ID=XB.SER_ID AND XA.SER_CONN_ID=XB.SER_CONN_ID AND ISNULL(XA.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,0)>0 AND ISNULL(XB.ENQ_JNY_PRICE_SUP,0)>0 AND XB.SUB_NUM>0 INNER JOIN SER_MAIN XC ON XA.SER_ID=XC.SER_ID INNER JOIN SUP_MAIN XD ON XB.SUP_DOWN_ID=XD.SUP_ID ) where exists(select 1 from GRP_FIN_TYPE x where a.ENQ_OP_ID = x.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID and x.FIN_TYPE=0 and x.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='ENQ_OP_MAIN' and x.grp_id=@grp_id and x.RELATE_SUP_ID=@SUP_ID ) and not exists(select 1 from GRP_FIN_TYPE x where x.GRP_FIN_TYPE_REFID = @ENQ_OP_ID and x.FIN_TYPE=0 and x.GRP_FIN_TYPE_FROM ='ENQ_OP_MAIN' and x.grp_id=@grp_id and x.RELATE_SUP_ID=@SUP_ID ) and isnull(a.SELECT_STATE,'')!='CHECKED_TRUE' AND ISNULL(a.SUP_TYPE,'')!='SUP_GRD_ORD' AND a.SUP_ID=@SUP_ID and b.grp_id=@grp_id ) x where 1=1;

Set.Name: OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql: with dj_income as( select a.GRP_ID,sum(b.SUM_ACCOUNT) INCOME -- 金额 ,sum(b.SUM_ACCOUNT*sc.GRP_POINT) RMB_INCOME -- 人民币金额 ,sum(b.SUM_ACCOUNT*sc.GRP_POINT*scp.GRP_POINT) LOCAL_INCOME -- 本币金额 ,sum(a.COS_PRICE) PLAN_INCOME ,sum(a.COS_PRICE*sc.GRP_POINT) RMB_PLAN_INCOME ,sum(a.COS_PRICE*sc.GRP_POINT*scp.GRP_POINT) LOCAL_PLAN_INCOME from GRP_FIN_TYPE a inner join ( select sum(xb.account) SUM_ACCOUNT ,xb.GRP_FIN_TYPE from GRP_FIN_TYPE xa inner join grp_finance xb on xa.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID=xb.GRP_FIN_TYPE where xa.fin_type=0 and xb.PAY_STATUS = 'PAY_YES' and xb.FIN_TYPES = 'FIN_PAY' and xa.GRP_FIN_TYPE_STATUS='USED' and xa.RELATE_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID group by xb.GRP_FIN_TYPE ) b on a.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID=b.GRP_FIN_TYPE INNER JOIN grp_main gm ON a.grp_id = gm.grp_id inner join grp_coin sc on gm.grp_id=sc.grp_id and sc.coin_to=1 and a.COIN_ID = sc.COIN_FROM inner join sup_main sm on a.RELATE_SUP_ID = sm.SUP_ID inner join grp_coin scp on gm.grp_id=scp.grp_id and scp.COIN_FROM = 1 and scp.COIN_TO = sm.SUP_COIN_ID where a.fin_type=0 and a.GRP_FIN_TYPE_STATUS='USED' and a.RELATE_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID group by a.GRP_ID ), dj_reim_paid as ( select a.GRP_ID,sum(b.ACCOUNT) REIM_PAID,sum(b.ACCOUNT*sc.GRP_POINT) RMB_REIM_PAID ,sum(b.ACCOUNT*sc.GRP_POINT*scp.GRP_POINT) LOCAL_REIM_PAID from grp_main a inner join grp_finance b on a.GRP_ID = b.grp_id and b.PAY_STATUS = 'PAY_YES' and b.FIN_TYPES = 'FIN_PAY' inner join GRP_PAY_APPLY c on b.APPLY_ID = c.APPLY_ID inner join grp_coin sc on a.grp_id=sc.grp_id and sc.coin_to=1 and c.COIN_ID = sc.COIN_FROM inner join sup_main sm on c.APPLY_SUP_ID = sm.SUP_ID inner join grp_coin scp on a.grp_id=scp.grp_id and scp.COIN_FROM = 1 and scp.COIN_TO = sm.SUP_COIN_ID where c.APPLY_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID and c.TYPEX = 'reim' group by a.GRP_ID ), dj_plan_paid as ( select d.GRP_ID , sum(b.SUM_ACCOUNT) PLAN_PAID,sum(b.SUM_ACCOUNT*sc.GRP_POINT) RMB_PLAN_PAID ,sum(b.SUM_ACCOUNT*sc.GRP_POINT*scp.GRP_POINT) LOCAL_PLAN_PAID ,sum(e.COS_PRICE) PLAN_ACCOUNT ,sum(e.COS_PRICE*sc.GRP_POINT) RMB_PLAN_ACCOUNT ,sum(e.COS_PRICE*sc.GRP_POINT*scp.GRP_POINT) LOCAL_PLAN_ACCOUNT from GRP_FIN_TYPE e inner join (select sum(xb.account) SUM_ACCOUNT ,xb.GRP_FIN_TYPE from GRP_FIN_TYPE xa inner join grp_finance xb on xa.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID=xb.GRP_FIN_TYPE where xa.fin_type=0 and xb.PAY_STATUS = 'PAY_YES' and xb.FIN_TYPES = 'FIN_PAY' and xa.GRP_FIN_TYPE_STATUS='USED' and xa.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID group by xb.GRP_FIN_TYPE) b on b.GRP_FIN_TYPE = e.GRP_FIN_TYPE_ID inner join grp_main gm on gm.GRP_ID = e.grp_id inner join ENQ_OP_BATCH_ORDER c on gm.GRP_REF_ID = c.ENQ_ORD_ID inner join ENQ_OP_BATCH_CONN d on c.ENQ_OP_BATCH_ID = d.ENQ_OP_BATCH_ID inner join grp_coin sc on d.grp_id=sc.grp_id and sc.coin_to=1 and e.COIN_ID = sc.COIN_FROM inner join sup_main sm on e.SUP_ID = sm.SUP_ID inner join grp_coin scp on d.grp_id=scp.grp_id and scp.COIN_FROM = 1 and scp.COIN_TO = sm.SUP_COIN_ID where gm.GRP_REF_TABLE = 'ENQ_OP_BATCH_ORDER' -- 地接支出团 and gm.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID group by d.GRP_ID ) SELECT quote_adm.adm_name as quote_adm, a.ENQ_OP_ID, a.ENQ_ID, a.ADM_ID, a.CREATE_TIME, a.STATE, a.CONFIRM_NO, a.FLOW_STATE, a.ENQ_JNY_ID, a.ENQ_OP_QUOTE_STATUS, e.SUP_NAME, gg.grp_id, gg.GRP_NAME, a.ser_ids, a.SELECT_STATE, -- ewa_test @EWA_LANG='enus' CASE WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE' THEN 'normal status' ELSE 'Obsolete (re-quote)' END AS ST, CASE WHEN au.adm_name_en IS NULL OR au.adm_name_en = '' THEN au.adm_name ELSE au.adm_name_en END AS adm_name, -- ewa_test @EWA_LANG != 'enus' CASE WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_TRUE' THEN '正常状态' WHEN ENQ_SELECT_STATE = 'CHECKED_FALSE' THEN '作废（重新询价）' else '' END AS ST, au.adm_name, -- @ewa_test HEAD_NUM + PEOPLE_NUM nums, gg.GRP_HY_CODE, gg.GRP_SDATE, gg.GRP_STA, dd.*, CASE WHEN PIC_PHY_PATH IS NULL OR PIC_PHY_PATH = '' THEN NULL ELSE '1' END a, a.PIC_MD5, DBO.F_ENQ_OP_ISCAN_DEL (A.ENQ_OP_ID) AS DELE, DBO.F_PART_JNY_SEND (A.ENQ_OP_ID) AS PJSTA, E.SUP_PID, isnull(wcl.REF_TAG, '') follow , djc.LOCAL_INCOME , r.LOCAL_REIM_PAID , p.LOCAL_PLAN_PAID , isnull(r.LOCAL_REIM_PAID,0) + isnull(p.LOCAL_PLAN_PAID,0) LOCAL_PAID , isnull(djc.LOCAL_INCOME,0) - isnull(r.LOCAL_REIM_PAID,0) - isnull(p.LOCAL_PLAN_PAID,0) LOCAL_PROFIT FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a left join adm_user quote_adm on a.ENQ_OP_QUOTE_ADM = quote_adm.adm_id LEFT JOIN enq_main c ON a.enq_id = c.enq_id INNER JOIN grp_main gg ON c.grp_id = gg.grp_id LEFT JOIN adm_user au ON a.ADM_ID = au.ADM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BAS_TAG, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG = 'enus' THEN ISNULL(BAS_TAG_NAME_EN, BAS_TAG_NAME) ELSE BAS_TAG_NAME END BAS_TAG_NAME FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'SUP_OP_TP' ) STP ON A.SUP_TYPE = STP.BAS_TAG LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG = 'enus' THEN ISNULL(SUP_NAME_EN, SUP_NAME) ELSE SUP_NAME END SUP_NAME, SUP_ID, SUP_PID FROM sup_main ) e ON a.own_sup_id = e.sup_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT enq_op_id OPID, B.COIN_NAME, B.COIN_ID, sum(enq_jny_price * SUB_NUM) BASE_PRICE, sum(enq_jny_price_op * SUB_NUM) AS OP_PRICE, sum(enq_jny_price_sup * (SUB_NUM - ISNULL(EOMS_FREE, 0))) AS SUP_PRICE -- EOMS_FREE 免额 FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN_SUB A INNER JOIN ( SELECT COIN_ID, CASE WHEN @EWA_LANG = 'enus' THEN COIN_KEY ELSE COIN_NAME END COIN_NAME, COIN_KEY FROM SYS_COIN ) B ON A.COIN_ID = B.COIN_ID WHERE sup_down_id = @G_SUP_ID GROUP BY enq_op_id, B.COIN_ID, COIN_NAME ) Dd ON A.ENQ_OP_ID = Dd.OPID LEFT JOIN web_click_log wcl ON a.ENQ_OP_ID = wcl.REF_ID AND wcl.SIT_ID = 0 AND wcl.REF_TAG = 'ENQ_OP_MAIN' AND wcl.USR_ID = @G_ADM_ID left join dj_income djc on gg.grp_id=djc.grp_id left join dj_plan_paid p on gg.grp_id=p.grp_id left join dj_reim_paid r on gg.grp_id=r.grp_id WHERE A.SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID AND A.ENQ_OP_STATE = 'USED' -- ewa_test @grp_id is not null AND enq_op_grp_id is null AND gg.grp_id = @grp_id -- ewa_test enq_op_grp_id is not null AND gg.grp_id = @enq_op_grp_id -- ewa_test @confirmed='no' AND CONFIRM_NO IS NULL AND isnull(ENQ_SELECT_STATE, '') != 'CHECKED_FALSE' /* 最终预定 初始预订 */ AND gg.DESTINE_STATE IN ('DESTINE_ING', 'DESTINE_FIN') -- ewa_test @confirmed='yes' AND CONFIRM_NO IS NOT NULL -- ewa_test @enq_op_id>0 AND A.enq_op_id = @enq_op_id -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id>0 AND A.enq_op_id = @up_enq_op_id -- ewa_test ORDER BY enq_op_id DESC

Set.Name: follow sql
Set.Sql:
delete web_click_log where SIT_ID=0 and REF_TAG='ENQ_OP_MAIN' and REF_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID and USR_ID=@g_adm_id ;
insert into web_click_log(SIT_ID,REF_TAG,REF_ID,CLK_CDATE,USR_ID) select 0,'ENQ_OP_MAIN',ENQ_OP_ID,getdate(),@g_adm_id from ENQ_OP_MAIN where ENQ_OP_ID=@ENQ_OP_ID and @EWA_SWITCH='on'

Set.CallName: 选中询价单并且各个流程置于完结状态
自动生成支出计划和支出申请

Set.Name: OnPageLoadNew
OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT a.*, a.ENQ_JNY_ID as ENQ_JNY_IDS FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a WHERE ENQ_OP_ID = @ENQ_OP_ID AND OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID;
SELECT a.crm_com_name AS new_sup_name, a.CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS, CASE WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS IS NULL THEN 'COM_YES' WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS = '' THEN 'COM_YES' WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS = 'COOP_STATUS_PARTNER' THEN 'COM_YES' ELSE 'COM_NO' END AS ENQ_OP_IS_COOP FROM crm_com a INNER JOIN crm_conn b ON a.crm_com_id = b.crm_com_id WHERE b.sup_down_id = @sup_id AND b.sup_up_id = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: OnNew SQL
OnModify SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT '团已经关闭,不能进行操作' AS EWA_ERR_OUT from grp_main where grp_id=@grp_id and CLAC_STATUS IN('FINALLY_CLOSE','CLOSE') ;
UPDATE ENQ_OP_MAIN SET SUP_ID = @SUP_ID, ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID, SER_IDS = @SER_IDS, HTML = @HTML, remark = @REMARK, PACT_HTML = @PACT_HTML, POPLE_NUM = @POPLE_NUM, CAR = @CAR, GUIDE = @GUIDE, HOTLE = @HOTLE, MEAL = @MEAL, SENIC = @SENIC, FEE = @FEE, PICK_UP = @PICK_UP, SHOPPING = @SHOPPING, PRACE = @PRACE, SPECIAL = @SPECIAL, SPECIAL_REMARK = @SPECIAL_REMARK, SUP_TYPE = @SUP_TYPE, ALL_PRICE = @ALL_PRICE, ENQ_METHOD = @ENQ_METHOD, AUTO_JNY = @AUTO_JNY WHERE ENQ_OP_ID = @ENQ_OP_ID AND OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Sql: -- write your sql

Set.Name: getremark
Set.Sql: select '第'+cast(enq_jny_day as varchar(5)) +'天：' as ed ,enq_jny_ob2,enq_jny_content from enq_jny where enq_jny_id in (select col from dbo.f_split(@key,','))

Set.Name: UPPRICE_OP
Set.Sql: UPDATE ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB SET ENQ_JNY_PRICE_OP=ENQ_JNY_PRICE WHERE ser_id IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@ser_ids,',')) AND SUP_ID=@g_sup_id AND SUP_DOWN_ID=@sup_id AND (SUB_TAG='AUTO' OR (SUB_TAG IS NULL AND ENQ_OTHER_SER_ID>0)) AND ENQ_JNY_ID IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@enq_jny_id,','))

Set.Name: GETPACTHTML
Set.Sql: SELECT DEFAULT_VALUE AS ENQ_OP_PAY_REMARK FROM SYS_DEFAULT WHERE TAG='ENQ_OP_PAY_REMARK'

Set.Name: 获取接待要求
Set.Sql: select people_num+head_num as pople_num,B1.SER_KEY_NAME AS CAR,B2.SER_KEY_NAME AS HOTLE,PICK_UP, GUIDE , meal , fee from enq_main A LEFT JOIN SER_KEY B1 ON ENQ_CAR_ID=B1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY B2 ON ENQ_HOTEL_ID=B2.SER_KEY_ID where enq_id=@enq_id;

Set.Name: 获取景点
Set.Sql: select dbo.f_get_senic(@enq_id,@sup) as SENIC

Set.Name: getProviderSersAndEnqJnyDays SQL
Set.Sql:
-- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is not null SELECT DISTINCT c.SER_ID FROM enq_op_main a INNER JOIN enq_op_main_sub b ON a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id INNER JOIN ser_conn c ON b.SER_CONN_ID = c.SER_CONN_ID WHERE a.enq_op_id = @up_enq_op_id AND c.SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID = @SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is null SELECT DISTINCT SER_ID FROM enq_jny_ser_sub WHERE fro_enq_id = @enq_id AND sup_id = @g_sup_id AND sup_down_id = @SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID -- ewa_test ;
-- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is not null SELECT DISTINCT b.ENQ_JNY_ID FROM enq_op_main a INNER JOIN enq_op_main_sub b ON a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id INNER JOIN ser_conn c ON b.SER_CONN_ID = c.SER_CONN_ID WHERE a.enq_op_id = @up_enq_op_id AND c.SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID = @SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is null SELECT DISTINCT ENQ_JNY_ID FROM enq_jny_ser_sub WHERE fro_enq_id = @enq_id AND sup_id = @g_sup_id AND sup_down_id = @SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID -- ewa_test ;

Set.Name: delete_map

Set.Sql: select TOP 1'现金支出必须选择接收人' as EWA_ERR_OUT FROM ADM_USER where @SUP_TYPE='SUP_GRD_ORD' AND ISNULL(@JNY_ADM_ID,'')=''

Set.SearchSql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'SA_SP' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.Sql: SELECT BAS_TAG, BAS_TAG_NAME, BAS_TAG_NAME_EN FROM BAS_TAG WHERE BAS_TAG_GRP = 'ENQ_MOTHOD' and bas_tag_para1 ='2026' ORDER BY BAS_TAG_ORD

Set.SearchSql: SELECT SUP_ID, SUP_NAME FROM SUP_MAIN ORDER BY SUP_NAME

Set.Sql: SELECT SUP_ID, SUP_NAME FROM SUP_MAIN a INNER JOIN ( -- 分公司用 -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is not null SELECT DISTINCT c.SER_CONN_PROVIDER_SUP_ID as sid FROM enq_op_main a INNER JOIN enq_op_main_sub b ON a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id INNER JOIN ser_conn c ON b.SER_CONN_ID = c.SER_CONN_ID WHERE a.enq_op_id = @up_enq_op_id -- ewa_test @up_enq_op_id is null -- 路嘉 SELECT DISTINCT a.SUP_DOWN_ID as sid FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a WHERE a.FRO_ENQ_ID = @enq_id AND a.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id -- ewa_test ) b ON a.sup_id = b.sid ORDER BY SUP_NAME

SELECT a.ser_id, a.ser_name, a.ser_name_en FROM ser_main a -- ewa_test @UP_ENQ_OP_ID is not null INNER JOIN ( -- 下级供应商的询价单 SELECT DISTINCT a.SER_ID FROM enq_op_main_sub a INNER JOIN enq_op_main b ON a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id WHERE b.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id AND a.enq_op_ID = @UP_ENQ_OP_ID ) b ON a.ser_id = b.ser_id -- ewa_test @UP_ENQ_OP_ID is null INNER JOIN ( -- 自己 SELECT DISTINCT a.SER_ID FROM ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB a INNER JOIN enq_jny b ON a.ENQ_JNY_ID = b.ENQ_JNY_ID AND b.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID AND b.sup_id = @g_sup_id ) c ON a.ser_id = c.ser_id -- ewa_test WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY a.ser_ord

SELECT ENQ_JNY_DAY AS ed, 'D' + cast(ENQ_JNY_DAY AS varchar(10)) + ' [' + dbo.f_jny_way_name(F_ADD, TO_ADD, TO_ADD2, CITY_ID, case when TRAFFIC='AIR' then '/' else '-' end) + ']' AS ENQ_JNY_DAY, ENQ_JNY_ID FROM ENQ_JNY a left join (-- 下级供应商的询价单 select distinct a.enq_jny_id jny_id from enq_op_main_sub a inner join enq_op_main b on a.enq_op_id = b.enq_op_id where b.SUP_ID = @g_sup_id and b.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID ) b on a.enq_jny_id = b.jny_id WHERE a.ENQ_ID = @ENQ_ID and (a.sup_id = @g_sup_id or b.jny_id >0) ORDER BY ed

自动生成支出计划和支出申请

Set.Name: OnPageLoadNew
OnPageLoad SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT a.*, a.ENQ_JNY_ID as ENQ_JNY_IDS FROM ENQ_OP_MAIN a WHERE ENQ_OP_ID = @ENQ_OP_ID AND OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID;
SELECT a.crm_com_name AS new_sup_name, a.CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS, CASE WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS IS NULL THEN 'COM_YES' WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS = '' THEN 'COM_YES' WHEN CRM_COM_COOP_STATUS = 'COOP_STATUS_PARTNER' THEN 'COM_YES' ELSE 'COM_NO' END AS ENQ_OP_IS_COOP FROM crm_com a INNER JOIN crm_conn b ON a.crm_com_id = b.crm_com_id WHERE b.sup_down_id = @sup_id AND b.sup_up_id = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: OnNew SQL
OnModify SQL
Set.Sql:
SELECT '团已经关闭,不能进行操作' AS EWA_ERR_OUT from grp_main where grp_id=@grp_id and CLAC_STATUS IN('FINALLY_CLOSE','CLOSE') ;
UPDATE ENQ_OP_MAIN SET SUP_ID = @SUP_ID, ENQ_JNY_ID = @ENQ_JNY_ID, SER_IDS = @SER_IDS, HTML = @HTML, remark = @REMARK, PACT_HTML = @PACT_HTML, POPLE_NUM = @POPLE_NUM, CAR = @CAR, GUIDE = @GUIDE, HOTLE = @HOTLE, MEAL = @MEAL, SENIC = @SENIC, FEE = @FEE, PICK_UP = @PICK_UP, SHOPPING = @SHOPPING, PRACE = @PRACE, SPECIAL = @SPECIAL, SPECIAL_REMARK = @SPECIAL_REMARK, SUP_TYPE = @SUP_TYPE, ALL_PRICE = @ALL_PRICE, ENQ_METHOD = @ENQ_METHOD, AUTO_JNY = @AUTO_JNY, BIDDING_ADM_ID = @BIDDING_ADM_ID WHERE ENQ_OP_ID = @ENQ_OP_ID AND OWN_SUP_ID = @G_SUP_ID

Set.Name: getremark
Set.Sql: select '第'+cast(enq_jny_day as varchar(5)) +'天：' as ed ,enq_jny_ob2,enq_jny_content from enq_jny where enq_jny_id in (select col from dbo.f_split(@key,','))

Set.Name: UPPRICE_OP
Set.Sql: UPDATE ENQ_JNY_SER_SUB SET ENQ_JNY_PRICE_OP=ENQ_JNY_PRICE WHERE ser_id IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@ser_ids,',')) AND SUP_ID=@g_sup_id AND SUP_DOWN_ID=@sup_id AND (SUB_TAG='AUTO' OR (SUB_TAG IS NULL AND ENQ_OTHER_SER_ID>0)) AND ENQ_JNY_ID IN (SELECT col FROM dbo.f_split(@enq_jny_id,','))

Set.Name: GETPACTHTML
Set.Sql: SELECT DEFAULT_VALUE AS ENQ_OP_PAY_REMARK FROM SYS_DEFAULT WHERE TAG='ENQ_OP_PAY_REMARK'

Set.Name: 获取接待要求
Set.Sql: select people_num+head_num as pople_num,B1.SER_KEY_NAME AS CAR,B2.SER_KEY_NAME AS HOTLE,PICK_UP, GUIDE , meal , fee from enq_main A LEFT JOIN SER_KEY B1 ON ENQ_CAR_ID=B1.SER_KEY_ID LEFT JOIN SER_KEY B2 ON ENQ_HOTEL_ID=B2.SER_KEY_ID where enq_id=@enq_id;

Set.Name: 获取景点
Set.Sql: select dbo.f_get_senic(@enq_id,@sup) as SENIC
